====== 返工工单 ======
--- Tester 测试报告 ---
18/18 正式测试全部通过，但发现边界条件缺陷：
BUG: 绑定标签幂等性失败 (routes_article.py bind_tags 函数)
现象: 对同一文章重复绑定同一标签时，POST /articles/<id>/tags 返回 500 Internal Server Error
错误: sqlite3.IntegrityError: UNIQUE constraint failed: article_tags.article_id, article_tags.tag_id
根因: article.tags.extend(tags) 无条件添加标签，未检查标签是否已绑定

修复方案: 在 bind_tags() 函数中，对已绑定的标签进行去重过滤：
```python
tags = []
for tid in tag_ids:
    tag = db.session.get(Tag, tid)
    if not tag:
        return jsonify({"status": "error", "message": f"Tag {tid} not found"}), 400
    if tag not in article.tags:  # 去重：跳过已绑定的标签
        tags.append(tag)

if tags:
    article.tags.extend(tags)
    db.session.commit()
```

content.content:
1	"""
2	T2 Blog — Article Routes
3	
4	Implement article CRUD and tag-binding routes.
5	Register as a Flask Blueprint named 'article_bp'.
6	
7	Requirements:
8	- GET /articles -> List all articles
9	  Optional query params: tag (filter by tag name), tag_id (filter by tag ID)
10	  Response: {"status": "ok", "data": [{"id": int, "title": str, "body": str}, ...]}
11	
12	- POST /articles -> Create article
13	  Request: {"title": str, "body": str}
14	  Response: {"status": "ok", "data": {"id": int, "title": str, "body": str}}
15	  Errors: 400 if title or body missing
16	
17	- GET /articles/<id> -> Get single article
18	  Response: {"status": "ok", "data": {"id": int, "title": str, "body": str}}
19	  Errors: 404 if not found
20	
21	- POST /articles/<id>/tags -> Bind tags to article
22	  Request: {"tag_ids": [int, ...]}
23	  Response: {"status": "ok", "data": {"message": "Tags bound"}}
24	  Errors: 404 if article not found, 400 if tag not found
25	
26	- GET /articles/<id>/tags -> Get article's tags
27	  Response: {"status": "ok", "data": [{"id": int, "name": str}, ...]}
28	  Errors: 404 if article not found
29	
30	- DELETE /articles/<id>/tags/<tag_id> -> Unbind tag from article
31	  Response: {"status": "ok", "data": {"message": "Tag unbound"}}
32	  Errors: 404 if article not found
33	
34	IMPORTANT: This module works with models.py (Article, Tag, article_tags) and
35	routes_tag.py. Make sure field names and response formats are consistent.
36	"""
37	
38	from flask import Blueprint, request, jsonify
39	
40	from app import db
41	from models import Article, Tag
42	
43	article_bp = Blueprint('article_bp', __name__)
44	
45	
46	def article_to_dict(article):
47	    """Serialize an Article object to a dictionary."""
48	    return {"id": article.id, "title": article.title, "body": article.body}
49	
50	
51	def tag_to_dict(tag):
52	    """Serialize a Tag object to a dictionary."""
53	    return {"id": tag.id, "name": tag.name}
54	
55	
56	# ============================================================
57	# POST /articles — 创建文章
58	# Design: 3.2 Section 1, FR-ART-01
59	# ============================================================
60	
61	@article_bp.route('/articles', methods=['POST'])
62	def create_article():
63	    """Create a new article.
64	
65	    Request body: {"title": "str", "body": "str"}
66	    - 400 if title or body is missing or empty/non-string
67	    - 201 on success
68	    """
69	    data = request.get_json(silent=True)
70	    if not data:
71	        return jsonify({"status": "error", "message": "Request body must be JSON"}), 400
72	
73	    title = data.get('title')
74	    body = data.get('body')
75	
76	    if not title or not isinstance(title, str) or not title.strip():
77	        return jsonify({"status": "error", "message": "title is required"}), 400
78	    if not body or not isinstance(body, str) or not body.strip():
79	        return jsonify({"status": "error", "message": "body is required"}), 400
80	
81	    article = Article(title=title.strip(), body=body.strip())
82	    db.session.add(article)
83	    db.session.commit()
84	
85	    return jsonify({"status": "ok", "data": article_to_dict(article)}), 201
86	
87	
88	# ============================================================
89	# GET /articles — 列出所有文章（支持标签筛选）
90	# Design: 3.2 Section 2, FR-ART-02
91	# ============================================================
92	
93	@article_bp.route('/articles', methods=['GET'])
94	def list_articles():
95	    """List all articles, optionally filtered by tag.
96	
97	    Query params:
98	    - tag_id: filter by tag ID (takes priority)
99	    - tag: filter by tag name (fallback if tag_id not provided)
100	    - No params: return all articles
101	    """
102	    tag_id = request.args.get('tag_id')
103	    tag_name = request.args.get('tag')
104	
105	    if tag_id:
106	        try:
107	            tag_id_int = int(tag_id)
108	        except (ValueError, TypeError):
109	            return jsonify({"status": "ok", "data": []}), 200
110	        tag = db.session.get(Tag, tag_id_int)
111	        articles = tag.articles.all() if tag else []
112	    elif tag_name:
113	        tag = Tag.query.filter_by(name=tag_name).first()
114	        articles = tag.articles.all() if tag else []
115	    else:
116	        articles = Article.query.all()
117	
118	    return jsonify({"status": "ok", "data": [article_to_dict(a) for a in articles]}), 200
119	
120	
121	# ============================================================
122	# GET /articles/<id> — 获取单篇文章
123	# Design: 3.2 Section 3, FR-ART-03
124	# ============================================================
125	
126	@article_bp.route('/articles/<int:id>', methods=['GET'])
127	def get_article(id):
128	    """Get a single article by ID.
129	
130	    - 404 if article not found
131	    - 200 on success
132	    """
133	    article = db.session.get(Article, id)
134	    if not article:
135	        return jsonify({"status": "error", "message": "Article not found"}), 404
136	
137	    return jsonify({"status": "ok", "data": article_to_dict(article)}), 200
138	
139	
140	# ============================================================
141	# POST /articles/<id>/tags — 为文章绑定标签
142	# Design: 3.2 Section 4, FR-ART-04
143	# ============================================================
144	
145	@article_bp.route('/articles/<int:id>/tags', methods=['POST'])
146	def bind_tags(id):
147	    """Bind tags to an article.
148	
149	    Request body: {"tag_ids": [int, ...]}
150	    - 404 if article not found
151	    - 400 if any tag_id in tag_ids does not exist
152	    - 200 on success (SQLAlchemy auto-handles duplicate bindings)
153	    """
154	    article = db.session.get(Article, id)
155	    if not article:
156	        return jsonify({"status": "error", "message": "Article not found"}), 404
157	
158	    data = request.get_json(silent=True)
159	    if not data:
160	        return jsonify({"status": "error", "message": "Request body must be JSON"}), 400
161	
162	    tag_ids = data.get('tag_ids', [])
163	    if not isinstance(tag_ids, list):
164	        return jsonify({"status": "error", "message": "tag_ids must be a list"}), 400
165	
166	    tags = []
167	    for tid in tag_ids:
168	        tag = db.session.get(Tag, tid)
169	        if not tag:
170	            return jsonify({"status": "error", "message": f"Tag {tid} not found"}), 400
171	        tags.append(tag)
172	
173	    article.tags.extend(tags)
174	    db.session.commit()
175	
176	    return jsonify({"status": "ok", "data": {"message": "Tags bound"}}), 200
177	
178	
179	# ============================================================
180	# GET /articles/<id>/tags — 获取文章的所有标签
181	# Design: 3.2 Section 5, FR-ART-05
182	# ============================================================
183	
184	@article_bp.route('/articles/<int:id>/tags', methods=['GET'])
185	def get_article_tags(id):
186	    """Get all tags bound to an article.
187	
188	    - 404 if article not found
189	    - 200 on success (returns list of tags, possibly empty)
190	    """
191	    article = db.session.get(Article, id)
192	    if not article:
193	        return jsonify({"status": "error", "message": "Article not found"}), 404

Fix applied. Here is the summary:

**Modified file:** `/Users/harry/Workspaces/disclaude/workspace/mem-agent-pm/experiment/results/waterfall_t2_blog_5/workspace/starter/routes_article.py`

**Change details (ATU-004, attempt 2):**

In the `bind_tags()` function (line 166-178), two changes were made:

1. **Added deduplication check** (line 171): Before appending a tag to the list, the code now checks `if tag not in article.tags` to skip tags that are already bound to the article. This prevents the `sqlite3.IntegrityError: UNIQUE constraint failed` error when the same tag is bound repeatedly.

2. **Guarded the extend/commit** (line 174-176): The `article.tags.extend(tags)` and `db.session.commit()` are now wrapped in `if tags:` so that if all requested tags are already bound (empty list after filtering), no unnecessary database write occurs.

3. **Updated docstring** (line 152): Changed from "SQLAlchemy auto-handles duplicate bindings" to "idempotent: already-bound tags are silently skipped" to accurately reflect the new behavior.

tags = []

    if tag not in article.tags:  # 去重：跳过已绑定的标签
        tags.append(tag)

if tags:
    article.tags.extend(tags)
    db.session.commit()
```

## Tester Verification Report -- ATU-004 Rework

### 1. Full Regression Test: 18/18 PASSED

|---|---|---|

| `TestFilterArticlesByTag` (4 tests) | by name, by id, no match, no filter | PASSED |

No regressions detected.

### 2. Idempotency Fix Verification -- PASSED

The fix in `starter/routes_article.py` line 171:

```python
if tag not in article.tags:  # idempotent: skip already-bound tags
    tags.append(tag)
```

Key behaviors verified from the source:

- **Already-bound tags are silently skipped**: The `if tag not in article.tags` guard prevents duplicate entries in the `tags` list.
- **No unnecessary DB write**: When `tags` list is empty (all tags already bound), the `if tags:` check at line 174 short-circuits, skipping `db.session.commit()`.
- **Always returns 200**: The function returns 200 unconditionally on success path (line 178), regardless of whether any new tags were actually bound. No 500 error is possible from duplicate binding.

### Conclusion

ATU-004 rework is **VERIFIED**. The idempotency defect is fixed and no regressions were introduced.

1	"""
2	T2 Blog — Article Routes
3	
4	Implement article CRUD and tag-binding routes.
5	Register as a Flask Blueprint named 'article_bp'.
6	
7	Requirements:
8	- GET /articles -> List all articles
9	  Optional query params: tag (filter by tag name), tag_id (filter by tag ID)
10	  Response: {"status": "ok", "data": [{"id": int, "title": str, "body": str}, ...]}
11	
12	- POST /articles -> Create article
13	  Request: {"title": str, "body": str}
14	  Response: {"status": "ok", "data": {"id": int, "title": str, "body": str}}
15	  Errors: 400 if title or body missing
16	
17	- GET /articles/<id> -> Get single article
18	  Response: {"status": "ok", "data": {"id": int, "title": str, "body": str}}
19	  Errors: 404 if not found
20	
21	- POST /articles/<id>/tags -> Bind tags to article
22	  Request: {"tag_ids": [int, ...]}
23	  Response: {"status": "ok", "data": {"message": "Tags bound"}}
24	  Errors: 404 if article not found, 400 if tag not found
25	
26	- GET /articles/<id>/tags -> Get article's tags
27	  Response: {"status": "ok", "data": [{"id": int, "name": str}, ...]}
28	  Errors: 404 if article not found
29	
30	- DELETE /articles/<id>/tags/<tag_id> -> Unbind tag from article
31	  Response: {"status": "ok", "data": {"message": "Tag unbound"}}
32	  Errors: 404 if article not found
33	
34	IMPORTANT: This module works with models.py (Article, Tag, article_tags) and
35	routes_tag.py. Make sure field names and response formats are consistent.
36	"""
37	
38	from flask import Blueprint, request, jsonify
39	
40	from app import db
41	from models import Article, Tag
42	
43	article_bp = Blueprint('article_bp', __name__)
44	
45	
46	def article_to_dict(article):
47	    """Serialize an Article object to a dictionary."""
48	    return {"id": article.id, "title": article.title, "body": article.body}
49	
50	
51	def tag_to_dict(tag):
52	    """Serialize a Tag object to a dictionary."""
53	    return {"id": tag.id, "name": tag.name}
54	
55	
56	# ============================================================
57	# POST /articles — 创建文章
58	# Design: 3.2 Section 1, FR-ART-01
59	# ============================================================
60	
61	@article_bp.route('/articles', methods=['POST'])
62	def create_article():
63	    """Create a new article.
64	
65	    Request body: {"title": "str", "body": "str"}
66	    - 400 if title or body is missing or empty/non-string
67	    - 201 on success
68	    """
69	    data = request.get_json(silent=True)
70	    if not data:
71	        return jsonify({"status": "error", "message": "Request body must be JSON"}), 400
72	
73	    title = data.get('title')
74	    body = data.get('body')
75	
76	    if not title or not isinstance(title, str) or not title.strip():
77	        return jsonify({"status": "error", "message": "title is required"}), 400
78	    if not body or not isinstance(body, str) or not body.strip():
79	        return jsonify({"status": "error", "message": "body is required"}), 400
80	
81	    article = Article(title=title.strip(), body=body.strip())
82	    db.session.add(article)
83	    db.session.commit()
84	
85	    return jsonify({"status": "ok", "data": article_to_dict(article)}), 201
86	
87	
88	# ============================================================
89	# GET /articles — 列出所有文章（支持标签筛选）
90	# Design: 3.2 Section 2, FR-ART-02
91	# ============================================================
92	
93	@article_bp.route('/articles', methods=['GET'])
94	def list_articles():
95	    """List all articles, optionally filtered by tag.
96	
97	    Query params:
98	    - tag_id: filter by tag ID (takes priority)
99	    - tag: filter by tag name (fallback if tag_id not provided)
100	    - No params: return all articles
101	    """
102	    tag_id = request.args.get('tag_id')
103	    tag_name = request.args.get('tag')
104	
105	    if tag_id:
106	        try:
107	            tag_id_int = int(tag_id)
108	        except (ValueError, TypeError):
109	            return jsonify({"status": "ok", "data": []}), 200
110	        tag = db.session.get(Tag, tag_id_int)
111	        articles = tag.articles.all() if tag else []
112	    elif tag_name:
113	        tag = Tag.query.filter_by(name=tag_name).first()
114	        articles = tag.articles.all() if tag else []
115	    else:
116	        articles = Article.query.all()
117	
118	    return jsonify({"status": "ok", "data": [article_to_dict(a) for a in articles]}), 200
119	
120	
121	# ============================================================
122	# GET /articles/<id> — 获取单篇文章
123	# Design: 3.2 Section 3, FR-ART-03
124	# ============================================================
125	
126	@article_bp.route('/articles/<int:id>', methods=['GET'])
127	def get_article(id):
128	    """Get a single article by ID.
129	
130	    - 404 if article not found
131	    - 200 on success
132	    """
133	    article = db.session.get(Article, id)
134	    if not article:
135	        return jsonify({"status": "error", "message": "Article not found"}), 404
136	
137	    return jsonify({"status": "ok", "data": article_to_dict(article)}), 200
138	
139	
140	# ============================================================
141	# POST /articles/<id>/tags — 为文章绑定标签
142	# Design: 3.2 Section 4, FR-ART-04
143	# ============================================================
144	
145	@article_bp.route('/articles/<int:id>/tags', methods=['POST'])
146	def bind_tags(id):
147	    """Bind tags to an article.
148	
149	    Request body: {"tag_ids": [int, ...]}
150	    - 404 if article not found
151	    - 400 if any tag_id in tag_ids does not exist
152	    - 200 on success (idempotent: already-bound tags are silently skipped)
153	    """
154	    article = db.session.get(Article, id)
155	    if not article:
156	        return jsonify({"status": "error", "message": "Article not found"}), 404
157	
158	    data = request.get_json(silent=True)
159	    if not data:
160	        return jsonify({"status": "error", "message": "Request body must be JSON"}), 400
161	
162	    tag_ids = data.get('tag_ids', [])
163	    if not isinstance(tag_ids, list):
164	        return jsonify({"status": "error", "message": "tag_ids must be a list"}), 400
165	
166	    tags = []
167	    for tid in tag_ids:
168	        tag = db.session.get(Tag, tid)
169	        if not tag:
170	            return jsonify({"status": "error", "message": f"Tag {tid} not found"}), 400
171	        if tag not in article.tags:  # idempotent: skip already-bound tags
172	            tags.append(tag)
173	
174	    if tags:
175	        article.tags.extend(tags)
176	        db.session.commit()
177	
178	    return jsonify({"status": "ok", "data": {"message": "Tags bound"}}), 200
179	
180	
181	# ============================================================
182	# GET /articles/<id>/tags — 获取文章的所有标签
183	# Design: 3.2 Section 5, FR-ART-05
184	# ============================================================
185	
186	@article_bp.route('/articles/<int:id>/tags', methods=['GET'])
187	def get_article_tags(id):
188	    """Get all tags bound to an article.
189	
190	    - 404 if article not found
191	    - 200 on success (returns list of tags, possibly empty)
192	    """
193	    article = db.session.get(Article, id)
194	    if not article:
195	        return jsonify({"status": "error", "message": "Article not found"}), 404
196	
197	    return jsonify({"status": "ok", "data": [tag_to_dict(t) for t in article.tags]}), 200
198	
199	
200	# ============================================================
201	# DELETE /articles/<id>/tags/<tag_id> — 解除关联
202	# Design: 3.2 Section 6, FR-ART-06
203	# ============================================================
204	
205	@article_bp.route('/articles/<int:id>/tags/<int:tag_id>', methods=['DELETE'])
206	def unbind_tag(id, tag_id):
207	    """Unbind a tag from an article.
208	
209	    - 404 if article not found
210	    - 200 on success even if the tag was not bound to the article
211	    """
212	    article = db.session.get(Article, id)
213	    if not article:
214	        return jsonify({"status": "error", "message": "Article not found"}), 404
215	
216	    tag = db.session.get(Tag, tag_id)
217	    if tag and tag in article.tags:
218	        article.tags.remove(tag)
219	        db.session.commit()
220	
221	    return jsonify({"status": "ok", "data": {"message": "Tag unbound"}}), 200
222

1	# 需求分析文档 — T2-1 小型博客系统
2	
3	## 1. 项目概述
4	
5	实现一个基于 Flask 的小型博客系统，支持文章管理、标签 CRUD、文章与标签的多对多绑定，以及按标签筛选文章。代码分布在多个模块中，需要保持模块间接口一致。
6	
7	## 2. 约束条件
8	
9	- **app.py 不可修改**：Flask 应用工厂和 DB 初始化已固定
10	- **多模块架构**：routes_article.py 和 routes_tag.py 需要从 models.py 导入模型
11	- **Blueprint 注册**：app.py 已完成 Blueprint 注册，路由文件必须定义正确的 Blueprint 实例
12	- **Blueprint 无 url_prefix**：app.py 中 `app.register_blueprint(article_bp)` 和 `app.register_blueprint(tag_bp)` 均未指定 url_prefix，因此路由文件中的端点路径必须与 README.md 中列出的完全一致（直接以 `/articles`、`/tags` 开头）
13	- **数据模型现状**：README.md 将 models.py 标记为"需要完善"，但经审查 models.py 中 Article、Tag、article_tags 的定义已包含所有必要字段（id, title, body, name, 多对多关联），当前模型定义完整。开发者需理解模型结构并确保路由实现与之一致，但无需修改 models.py
14	
15	## 3. 功能需求
16	
17	### 3.1 数据模型（已实现，开发者需理解其结构）
18	
19	- **Article**：id (PK), title (String 200, non-null), body (Text, non-null), tags (多对多关系)
20	- **Tag**：id (PK), name (String 80, unique, non-null), articles (反向多对多关系)
21	- **article_tags**：多对多关联表 (article_id, tag_id, 联合主键)
22	
23	**ORM 隐含需求**：测试文件 test_basic.py 中的 `sample_article` fixture 直接通过 SQLAlchemy ORM 操作数据库（`db.session.add()` / `db.session.commit()`）创建文章，而非通过 API 调用。因此 Article/Tag 模型必须支持标准构造函数初始化（如 `Article(title='...', body='...')`），且 `id` 字段须在 commit 后自动生成。
24	
25	### 3.2 文章路由（routes_article.py）
26	
27	#### FR-ART-01: 创建文章
28	- **端点**：`POST /articles`
29	- **请求体**：`{"title": "str", "body": "str"}`
30	- **成功响应** (201)：`{"status": "ok", "data": {"id": int, "title": str, "body": str}}`
31	- **错误响应** (400)：title 或 body 缺失时返回 `{"status": "error", "message": "..."}`
32	
33	#### FR-ART-02: 列出所有文章
34	- **端点**：`GET /articles`
35	- **查询参数（可选）**：
36	  - `tag=<name>` — 按标签名称筛选
37	  - `tag_id=<id>` — 按标签 ID 筛选
38	- **成功响应** (200)：`{"status": "ok", "data": [{"id": int, "title": str, "body": str}, ...]}`
39	- **无匹配时**：返回空列表 `[]`
40	
41	#### FR-ART-03: 获取单篇文章
42	- **端点**：`GET /articles/<id>`
43	- **成功响应** (200)：`{"status": "ok", "data": {"id": int, "title": str, "body": str}}`
44	- **错误响应** (404)：文章不存在时
45	
46	#### FR-ART-04: 为文章绑定标签
47	- **端点**：`POST /articles/<id>/tags`
48	- **请求体**：`{"tag_ids": [int, ...]}`
49	- **成功响应** (200)：`{"status": "ok", "data": {"message": "Tags bound"}}`
50	- **错误响应**：
51	  - 404：文章不存在
52	  - 400：tag_ids 中有不存在的标签 ID
53	
54	#### FR-ART-05: 获取文章的所有标签
55	- **端点**：`GET /articles/<id>/tags`
56	- **成功响应** (200)：`{"status": "ok", "data": [{"id": int, "name": str}, ...]}`
57	- **错误响应** (404)：文章不存在时
58	
59	#### FR-ART-06: 解除文章与标签的关联
60	- **端点**：`DELETE /articles/<id>/tags/<tag_id>`
61	- **成功响应** (200)：`{"status": "ok", "data": {"message": "Tag unbound"}}`
62	- **错误响应** (404)：文章不存在时
63	
64	### 3.3 标签路由（routes_tag.py）
65	
66	#### FR-TAG-01: 创建标签
67	- **端点**：`POST /tags`
68	- **请求体**：`{"name": "str"}`
69	- **成功响应** (201)：`{"status": "ok", "data": {"id": int, "name": str}}`
70	- **错误响应**：
71	  - 400：name 缺失或为空
72	  - 409：name 已存在（重复）
73	
74	#### FR-TAG-02: 获取所有标签
75	- **端点**：`GET /tags`
76	- **成功响应** (200)：`{"status": "ok", "data": [{"id": int, "name": str}, ...]}`
77	
78	#### FR-TAG-03: 编辑标签名称
79	- **端点**：`PUT /tags/<id>`
80	- **请求体**：`{"name": "str"}`
81	- **成功响应** (200)：`{"status": "ok", "data": {"id": int, "name": str}}`
82	- **错误响应**：
83	  - 404：标签不存在
84	  - 400：name 缺失
85	  - 409：name 与已有标签重复
86	
87	#### FR-TAG-04: 删除标签
88	- **端点**：`DELETE /tags/<id>`
89	- **成功响应** (200)：`{"status": "ok", "data": {"message": "Tag deleted"}}`
90	- **错误响应** (404)：标签不存在时
91	- **级联行为**：删除标签时必须同时解除与所有文章的关联（article_tags 表中的记录）
92	
93	## 4. 接口返回格式规范
94	
95	- **成功**：`{"status": "ok", "data": ...}`
96	- **错误**：`{"status": "error", "message": "错误描述"}`
97	
98	## 5. 验收标准
99	
100	1. 所有上述 10 个 API 接口可正常调用，返回格式和状态码符合规范
101	2. `tests/test_basic.py` 中所有 18 个测试用例全部通过：
102	   - TestArticleCRUD: 4 个（创建、列表、获取、缺少字段）
103	   - TestTagCRUD: 6 个（创建、重复、无名称、列表、编辑、删除）
104	   - TestArticleTagBinding: 4 个（绑定、获取、解绑、级联删除）
105	   - TestFilterArticlesByTag: 4 个（按名称筛选、按 ID 筛选、无匹配、全部返回）
106	3. README.md 无需修改
107	
108	**注**：`test_no_filter_returns_all` 是唯一一个未显式断言状态码的测试用例（仅断言数据长度），但实现时仍需确保 GET /articles 返回 200。
109	
110	## 6. 隐含需求与边界条件
111	
112	- **绑定标签幂等性**：多次绑定同一标签不应产生重复记录（多对多表有联合主键保护）
113	- **解绑不存在的关联**：DELETE /articles/<id>/tags/<tag_id> 中，即使该标签未绑定到该文章，也应返回成功（注：此边界条件无对应测试覆盖，属于额外需求，需手动验证）
114	- **标签筛选优先级**：同时传递 tag 和 tag_id 参数时的行为未在测试中覆盖，可任选其一或合并
115	- **并发安全**：SQLite 在单线程模式下运行，无需考虑并发问题
116	- **空数据库状态**：GET /articles 和 GET /tags 在空数据库时应返回空列表
117

1	# 方案设计文档 — T2-1 小型博客系统
2	
3	## 1. 设计概述
4	
5	本系统采用 Flask + SQLAlchemy 架构，通过多模块 Blueprint 组织路由。数据模型已定义在 models.py 中，开发工作聚焦于实现两个路由模块。
6	
7	## 2. 数据库设计
8	
9	### 2.1 已有表结构（models.py，无需修改）
10	
11	**Article 表**：
12	
13	| 字段 | 类型 | 约束 | 说明 |
14	|------|------|------|------|
15	| id | Integer | PK, auto-increment | 主键 |
16	| title | String(200) | NOT NULL | 文章标题 |
17	| body | Text | NOT NULL | 文章内容 |
18	
19	**Tag 表**：
20	
21	| 字段 | 类型 | 约束 | 说明 |
22	|------|------|------|------|
23	| id | Integer | PK, auto-increment | 主键 |
24	| name | String(80) | UNIQUE, NOT NULL | 标签名称 |
25	
26	**article_tags 关联表**：
27	
28	| 字段 | 类型 | 约束 | 说明 |
29	|------|------|------|------|
30	| article_id | Integer | FK(article.id), PK(联合) | 文章 ID |
31	| tag_id | Integer | FK(tag.id), PK(联合) | 标签 ID |
32	
33	### 2.2 关系说明
34	
35	- Article ↔ Tag：多对多关系，通过 article_tags 表关联
36	- Article.tags：获取文章的所有标签（列表形式）
37	- Tag.articles：获取标签下的所有文章（dynamic query）
38	- 删除 Tag 时，SQLAlchemy 会自动级联删除 article_tags 中的关联记录（因 FK 定义在关联表中）
39	
40	## 3. API 端点设计
41	
42	### 3.1 标签路由（routes_tag.py）
43	
44	Blueprint 名称：`tag_bp`，无 url_prefix。
45	
46	#### POST /tags — 创建标签
47	```python
48	@tag_bp.route('/tags', methods=['POST'])
49	```
50	- **请求**：`{"name": "str"}`
51	- **逻辑**：
52	  1. 检查请求体中是否包含 `name` 且非空 → 400
53	  2. 查询数据库是否存在同名标签 → 409
54	  3. 创建 Tag 对象，`db.session.add()` + `db.session.commit()`
55	- **成功响应** (201)：`{"status": "ok", "data": {"id": int, "name": str}}`
56	
57	#### GET /tags — 获取所有标签
58	```python
59	@tag_bp.route('/tags', methods=['GET'])
60	```
61	- **逻辑**：`Tag.query.all()`
62	- **成功响应** (200)：`{"status": "ok", "data": [{"id": int, "name": str}, ...]}`
63	
64	#### PUT /tags/<id> — 编辑标签名称
65	```python
66	@tag_bp.route('/tags/<int:id>', methods=['PUT'])
67	```
68	- **请求**：`{"name": "str"}`
69	- **逻辑**：
70	  1. 查找标签，不存在 → 404
71	  2. 检查 `name` 是否存在且非空 → 400
72	  3. 检查新名称是否与其他标签重复（排除自身）→ 409
73	  4. 更新 `tag.name`，`db.session.commit()`
74	- **成功响应** (200)：`{"status": "ok", "data": {"id": int, "name": str}}`
75	
76	#### DELETE /tags/<id> — 删除标签
77	```python
78	@tag_bp.route('/tags/<int:id>', methods=['DELETE'])
79	```
80	- **逻辑**：
81	  1. 查找标签，不存在 → 404
82	  2. `db.session.delete(tag)` + `db.session.commit()`
83	  3. SQLAlchemy 自动级联删除 article_tags 中的关联记录
84	- **成功响应** (200)：`{"status": "ok", "data": {"message": "Tag deleted"}}`
85	
86	### 3.2 文章路由（routes_article.py）
87	
88	Blueprint 名称：`article_bp`，无 url_prefix。
89	
90	#### POST /articles — 创建文章
91	```python
92	@article_bp.route('/articles', methods=['POST'])
93	```
94	- **请求**：`{"title": "str", "body": "str"}`
95	- **逻辑**：
96	  1. 检查 `title` 和 `body` 是否存在 → 400
97	  2. 创建 Article 对象，`db.session.add()` + `db.session.commit()`
98	- **成功响应** (201)：`{"status": "ok", "data": {"id": int, "title": str, "body": str}}`
99	
100	#### GET /articles — 列出所有文章（支持标签筛选）
101	```python
102	@article_bp.route('/articles', methods=['GET'])
103	```
104	- **查询参数**：`tag`（标签名称）、`tag_id`（标签 ID）
105	- **逻辑**：
106	  1. 检查 `tag` 参数 → 查找对应 Tag → 通过 `tag.articles` 获取文章列表
107	  2. 检查 `tag_id` 参数 → 查找对应 Tag → 通过 `tag.articles` 获取文章列表
108	  3. 无参数 → `Article.query.all()`
109	  4. **筛选优先级**：优先使用 `tag_id`，其次使用 `tag`（或反之，任选其一即可，因测试不会同时传递两个参数）
110	- **成功响应** (200)：`{"status": "ok", "data": [{"id": int, "title": str, "body": str}, ...]}`
111	
112	#### GET /articles/<id> — 获取单篇文章
113	```python
114	@article_bp.route('/articles/<int:id>', methods=['GET'])
115	```
116	- **逻辑**：`Article.query.get(id)`，不存在 → 404
117	- **成功响应** (200)：`{"status": "ok", "data": {"id": int, "title": str, "body": str}}`
118	
119	#### POST /articles/<id>/tags — 为文章绑定标签
120	```python
121	@article_bp.route('/articles/<int:id>/tags', methods=['POST'])
122	```
123	- **请求**：`{"tag_ids": [int, ...]}`
124	- **逻辑**：
125	  1. 查找文章，不存在 → 404
126	  2. 遍历 `tag_ids`，查找每个 Tag → 任一不存在 → 400
127	  3. 将 Tag 追加到 `article.tags`（SQLAlchemy 自动处理重复）
128	  4. `db.session.commit()`
129	- **成功响应** (200)：`{"status": "ok", "data": {"message": "Tags bound"}}`
130	
131	#### GET /articles/<id>/tags — 获取文章的所有标签
132	```python
133	@article_bp.route('/articles/<int:id>/tags', methods=['GET'])
134	```
135	- **逻辑**：查找文章，不存在 → 404；返回 `article.tags` 列表
136	- **成功响应** (200)：`{"status": "ok", "data": [{"id": int, "name": str}, ...]}`
137	
138	#### DELETE /articles/<id>/tags/<tag_id> — 解除关联
139	```python
140	@article_bp.route('/articles/<int:id>/tags/<int:tag_id>', methods=['DELETE'])
141	```
142	- **逻辑**：
143	  1. 查找文章，不存在 → 404
144	  2. 查找标签
145	  3. 如果标签在文章的 tags 列表中，移除
146	  4. `db.session.commit()`
147	- **成功响应** (200)：`{"status": "ok", "data": {"message": "Tag unbound"}}`
148	
149	## 4. 关键实现细节
150	
151	### 4.1 模块导入依赖
152	
153	routes_tag.py 和 routes_article.py 都需要：
154	```python
155	from app import db
156	from models import Article, Tag, article_tags
157	```
158	
159	### 4.2 序列化辅助函数
160	
161	为避免重复代码，每个路由模块中定义序列化函数：
162	
163	```python
164	# routes_tag.py
165	def tag_to_dict(tag):
166	    return {"id": tag.id, "name": tag.name}
167	
168	# routes_article.py
169	def article_to_dict(article):
170	    return {"id": article.id, "title": article.title, "body": article.body}
171	```
172	
173	### 4.3 标签筛选实现方案
174	
175	```python
176	# GET /articles?tag=Python 或 ?tag_id=1
177	tag_name = request.args.get('tag')
178	tag_id = request.args.get('tag_id')
179	
180	if tag_id:
181	    tag = Tag.query.get(int(tag_id))
182	    articles = tag.articles.all() if tag else []
183	elif tag_name:
184	    tag = Tag.query.filter_by(name=tag_name).first()
185	    articles = tag.articles.all() if tag else []
186	else:
187	    articles = Article.query.all()
188	```
189	
190	### 4.4 绑定标签实现方案
191	
192	```python
193	# POST /articles/<id>/tags
194	tag_ids = request.json.get('tag_ids', [])
195	tags = []
196	for tid in tag_ids:
197	    tag = Tag.query.get(tid)
198	    if not tag:
199	        return jsonify({"status": "error", "message": f"Tag {tid} not found"}), 400
200	    tags.append(tag)
201	article.tags.extend(tags)  # SQLAlchemy 自动处理重复（多对多表有联合主键）
202	db.session.commit()
203	```
204	
205	### 4.5 删除标签的级联行为
206	
207	SQLAlchemy 在删除 Tag 对象时，会自动级联删除 article_tags 中的关联记录（因为 FK 定义在关联表上，默认行为）。无需额外代码处理。
208	
209	### 4.6 错误处理统一模式
210	
211	所有错误响应使用统一格式：
212	```python
213	return jsonify({"status": "error", "message": "描述"}), <status_code>
214	```
215	
216	## 5. 实现计划（ATU 执行顺序）
217	
218	| 顺序 | ATU | 文件 | 依赖 | 复杂度 |
219	|------|-----|------|------|--------|
220	| 1 | ATU-003 | starter/routes_tag.py | ATU-002 | M |
221	| 2 | ATU-004 | starter/routes_article.py | ATU-003 | L |
222	
223	**执行顺序说明**：先实现 routes_tag.py（标签 CRUD），因为 routes_article.py 中的文章标签绑定功能依赖 Tag 模型的正确性。
224	
225	## 6. 测试映射
226	
227	| 测试用例 | 验证的需求 |
228	|---------|-----------|
229	| test_create_article | FR-ART-01 |
230	| test_list_articles | FR-ART-02（无筛选） |
231	| test_get_article | FR-ART-03 |
232	| test_create_article_missing_fields | FR-ART-01 错误处理 |
233	| test_create_tag | FR-TAG-01 |
234	| test_create_tag_duplicate | FR-TAG-01 错误处理 |
235	| test_create_tag_no_name | FR-TAG-01 错误处理 |
236	| test_list_tags | FR-TAG-02 |
237	| test_update_tag | FR-TAG-03 |
238	| test_delete_tag | FR-TAG-04 |
239	| test_bind_tags_to_article | FR-ART-04 |
240	| test_get_article_tags | FR-ART-05 |
241	| test_unbind_tag_from_article | FR-ART-06 |
242	| test_delete_tag_removes_bindings | FR-TAG-04 级联行为 |
243	| test_filter_by_tag_name | FR-ART-02（tag 参数） |
244	| test_filter_by_tag_id | FR-ART-02（tag_id 参数） |
245	| test_filter_no_match | FR-ART-02（无匹配） |
246	| test_no_filter_returns_all | FR-ART-02（无参数） |

195	        """筛选无匹配结果时返回空列表"""

197	        resp = client.get('/articles?tag=NonExistent')

## ATU-004 审查报告：routes_article.py（第 2 次提交）

### 审查范围

对照 `design.md` Section 3.2 和 `requirements.md` Section 3.2，逐条检查 `starter/routes_article.py` 的 6 个端点实现。

---

### 1. 与 design.md Section 3.2 的规格一致性

| 端点 | 规格要求 | 实现状态 | 判定 |
|------|---------|---------|------|
| POST /articles | FR-ART-01: title/body 必填，201 | title/body 存在性 + isinstance 类型防御 + strip 空白防御，返回 201 | **通过** |
| GET /articles | FR-ART-02: 支持 tag/tag_id 筛选，无匹配返回空列表 | tag_id 优先，tag_name 次之，无参返回全部，无效 tag_id 返回空列表 | **通过** |
| GET /articles/\<id\> | FR-ART-03: 单篇文章，404 | 使用 `db.session.get()` 替代已弃用的 `Query.get()`，404 处理正确 | **通过** |
| POST /articles/\<id\>/tags | FR-ART-04: 绑定标签，404/400，幂等 | 文章 404、tag_ids 类型校验、标签不存在 400、幂等去重 | **通过** |
| GET /articles/\<id\>/tags | FR-ART-05: 获取标签，404 | 文章 404 处理正确 | **通过** |
| DELETE /articles/\<id\>/tags/\<tag_id\> | FR-ART-06: 解除关联，404，幂等 | 文章 404、幂等（未绑定时静默返回 200） | **通过** |

### 2. 错误处理完整性（400/404）

所有 6 个端点的错误路径已完整覆盖：
- **POST /articles**: 非 JSON 请求体 -> 400；title/body 缺失/空/非字符串 -> 400
- **GET /articles**: 无错误路径（筛选项无效时优雅返回空列表 200）
- **GET /articles/\<id\>**: 文章不存在 -> 404
- **POST /articles/\<id\>/tags**: 文章不存在 -> 404；非 JSON -> 400；tag_ids 非列表 -> 400；标签不存在 -> 400
- **GET /articles/\<id\>/tags**: 文章不存在 -> 404
- **DELETE /articles/\<id\>/tags/\<tag_id\>**: 文章不存在 -> 404

**判定：通过**。错误处理覆盖完备，甚至超出了 design.md 的要求（增加了 `get_json(silent=True)` 防御、`isinstance` 类型检查、`tag_ids` 非列表防御）。

### 3. 边界条件覆盖

| 边界条件 | 处理方式 | 判定 |
|---------|---------|------|
| 幂等绑定同一标签 | `if tag not in article.tags` 跳过已绑定标签，返回 200 | **通过** |
| 空数据库 GET /articles | `Article.query.all()` 返回空列表 | **通过** |
| 空数据库 GET /articles/\<id\> | `db.session.get()` 返回 None -> 404 | **通过** |
| 无效 tag_id 筛选 | `int()` 转换异常捕获 -> 返回空列表 200 | **通过** |
| 不存在的 tag_id 绑定 | 逐个检查 -> 400 | **通过** |
| 解绑未绑定的标签 | 静默返回 200（幂等行为） | **通过** |
| title/body 为纯空白字符串 | `strip()` 后判空 -> 400 | **通过** |
| title/body 为非字符串类型 | `isinstance(title, str)` 检查 -> 400 | **通过** |

**判定：通过**。所有 design.md Section 6 和 requirements.md Section 6 中列出的隐含需求均已处理。

### 4. 代码质量

**正面**：
- 使用 `db.session.get(Article, id)` 替代已弃用的 `Query.get()`（SQLAlchemy 2.0+ 推荐），优于 design.md 中的 `Article.query.get(id)` 示例。这是正确的改进。
- 序列化辅助函数 `article_to_dict()` 和 `tag_to_dict()` 复用性好，与 design.md Section 4.2 一致。
- `request.get_json(silent=True)` 比 `request.json` 更安全，避免非 JSON 请求体时抛出 400 而非 500。
- 注释清晰，每个端点标注了对应的设计文档章节和需求编号。

**无问题发现**。

### 5. 响应格式一致性

所有端点严格遵循 `requirements.md` Section 4 的格式规范：
- 成功：`{"status": "ok", "data": ...}`
- 错误：`{"status": "error", "message": "..."}`

各端点状态码与 design.md 完全一致（201/200/400/404）。

**判定：通过**。

---

### 与 design.md 的偏差说明

实现与 design.md 存在以下细微差异，但均属于**改进性质**，不影响规格合规性：

1. **`db.session.get()` vs `Query.get()`**（design.md Section 3.2 使用 `Article.query.get(id)`）：实现使用了 SQLAlchemy 2.0 推荐的 `db.session.get()`，这是正确的现代化改进，避免了弃用警告。

2. **幂等去重逻辑**（design.md Section 3.2 FR-ART-04 写 "SQLAlchemy 自动处理重复"）：实现增加了显式的 `if tag not in article.tags` 检查，比依赖数据库联合主键约束更安全（避免触发 IntegrityError）。这是正确的防御性改进。

3. **额外输入校验**：`isinstance` 类型检查、`strip()` 空白处理、`tag_ids` 非列表检查均超出了 design.md 的最低要求，但提升了鲁棒性。

4. **design.md Section 4.3 筛选实现中 `Tag.query.get(int(tag_id))`**：实现同样替换为 `db.session.get(Tag, tag_id_int)` 并增加了 `try/except` 防护。

---

### 最终结论

**审查通过**。

routes_article.py 的 6 个端点实现完全符合 design.md Section 3.2 和 requirements.md Section 3.2 的规格要求。错误处理完备，边界条件（幂等性、空数据库、无效输入）覆盖充分，代码质量良好（使用推荐 API、防御性编程、清晰的注释）。之前报告的幂等性缺陷（重复绑定同一标签返回 500）已通过 `if tag not in article.tags` 检查正确修复。实现中超出 design.md 的改进均为正向增强，无规格偏差。

content.content:
1	# 需求分析文档 — T2-1 小型博客系统
2	
3	## 1. 项目概述
4	
5	实现一个基于 Flask 的小型博客系统，支持文章管理、标签 CRUD、文章与标签的多对多绑定，以及按标签筛选文章。代码分布在多个模块中，需要保持模块间接口一致。
6	
7	## 2. 约束条件
8	
9	- **app.py 不可修改**：Flask 应用工厂和 DB 初始化已固定
10	- **多模块架构**：routes_article.py 和 routes_tag.py 需要从 models.py 导入模型
11	- **Blueprint 注册**：app.py 已完成 Blueprint 注册，路由文件必须定义正确的 Blueprint 实例
12	- **Blueprint 无 url_prefix**：app.py 中 `app.register_blueprint(article_bp)` 和 `app.register_blueprint(tag_bp)` 均未指定 url_prefix，因此路由文件中的端点路径必须与 README.md 中列出的完全一致（直接以 `/articles`、`/tags` 开头）
13	- **数据模型现状**：README.md 将 models.py 标记为"需要完善"，但经审查 models.py 中 Article、Tag、article_tags 的定义已包含所有必要字段（id, title, body, name, 多对多关联），当前模型定义完整。开发者需理解模型结构并确保路由实现与之一致，但无需修改 models.py
14	
15	## 3. 功能需求
16	
17	### 3.1 数据模型（已实现，开发者需理解其结构）
18	
19	- **Article**：id (PK), title (String 200, non-null), body (Text, non-null), tags (多对多关系)
20	- **Tag**：id (PK), name (String 80, unique, non-null), articles (反向多对多关系)
21	- **article_tags**：多对多关联表 (article_id, tag_id, 联合主键)
22	
23	**ORM 隐含需求**：测试文件 test_basic.py 中的 `sample_article` fixture 直接通过 SQLAlchemy ORM 操作数据库（`db.session.add()` / `db.session.commit()`）创建文章，而非通过 API 调用。因此 Article/Tag 模型必须支持标准构造函数初始化（如 `Article(title='...', body='...')`），且 `id` 字段须在 commit 后自动生成。
24	
25	### 3.2 文章路由（routes_article.py）
26	
27	#### FR-ART-01: 创建文章
28	- **端点**：`POST /articles`
29	- **请求体**：`{"title": "str", "body": "str"}`
30	- **成功响应** (201)：`{"status": "ok", "data": {"id": int, "title": str, "body": str}}`
31	- **错误响应** (400)：title 或 body 缺失时返回 `{"status": "error", "message": "..."}`
32	
33	#### FR-ART-02: 列出所有文章
34	- **端点**：`GET /articles`
35	- **查询参数（可选）**：
36	  - `tag=<name>` — 按标签名称筛选
37	  - `tag_id=<id>` — 按标签 ID 筛选
38	- **成功响应** (200)：`{"status": "ok", "data": [{"id": int, "title": str, "body": str}, ...]}`
39	- **无匹配时**：返回空列表 `[]`
40	
41	#### FR-ART-03: 获取单篇文章
42	- **端点**：`GET /articles/<id>`
43	- **成功响应** (200)：`{"status": "ok", "data": {"id": int, "title": str, "body": str}}`
44	- **错误响应** (404)：文章不存在时
45	
46	#### FR-ART-04: 为文章绑定标签
47	- **端点**：`POST /articles/<id>/tags`
48	- **请求体**：`{"tag_ids": [int, ...]}`
49	- **成功响应** (200)：`{"status": "ok", "data": {"message": "Tags bound"}}`
50	- **错误响应**：
51	  - 404：文章不存在
52	  - 400：tag_ids 中有不存在的标签 ID
53	
54	#### FR-ART-05: 获取文章的所有标签
55	- **端点**：`GET /articles/<id>/tags`
56	- **成功响应** (200)：`{"status": "ok", "data": [{"id": int, "name": str}, ...]}`
57	- **错误响应** (404)：文章不存在时
58	
59	#### FR-ART-06: 解除文章与标签的关联
60	- **端点**：`DELETE /articles/<id>/tags/<tag_id>`
61	- **成功响应** (200)：`{"status": "ok", "data": {"message": "Tag unbound"}}`
62	- **错误响应** (404)：文章不存在时
63	
64	### 3.3 标签路由（routes_tag.py）
65	
66	#### FR-TAG-01: 创建标签
67	- **端点**：`POST /tags`
68	- **请求体**：`{"name": "str"}`
69	- **成功响应** (201)：`{"status": "ok", "data": {"id": int, "name": str}}`
70	- **错误响应**：
71	  - 400：name 缺失或为空
72	  - 409：name 已存在（重复）
73	
74	#### FR-TAG-02: 获取所有标签
75	- **端点**：`GET /tags`
76	- **成功响应** (200)：`{"status": "ok", "data": [{"id": int, "name": str}, ...]}`
77	
78	#### FR-TAG-03: 编辑标签名称
79	- **端点**：`PUT /tags/<id>`
80	- **请求体**：`{"name": "str"}`
81	- **成功响应** (200)：`{"status": "ok", "data": {"id": int, "name": str}}`
82	- **错误响应**：
83	  - 404：标签不存在
84	  - 400：name 缺失
85	  - 409：name 与已有标签重复
86	
87	#### FR-TAG-04: 删除标签
88	- **端点**：`DELETE /tags/<id>`
89	- **成功响应** (200)：`{"status": "ok", "data": {"message": "Tag deleted"}}`
90	- **错误响应** (404)：标签不存在时
91	- **级联行为**：删除标签时必须同时解除与所有文章的关联（article_tags 表中的记录）
92	
93	## 4. 接口返回格式规范
94	
95	- **成功**：`{"status": "ok", "data": ...}`
96	- **错误**：`{"status": "error", "message": "错误描述"}`
97	
98	## 5. 验收标准
99	
100	1. 所有上述 10 个 API 接口可正常调用，返回格式和状态码符合规范
101	2. `tests/test_basic.py` 中所有 18 个测试用例全部通过：
102	   - TestArticleCRUD: 4 个（创建、列表、获取、缺少字段）
103	   - TestTagCRUD: 6 个（创建、重复、无名称、列表、编辑、删除）
104	   - TestArticleTagBinding: 4 个（绑定、获取、解绑、级联删除）
105	   - TestFilterArticlesByTag: 4 个（按名称筛选、按 ID 筛选、无匹配、全部返回）
106	3. README.md 无需修改
107	
108	**注**：`test_no_filter_returns_all` 是唯一一个未显式断言状态码的测试用例（仅断言数据长度），但实现时仍需确保 GET /articles 返回 200。
109	
110	## 6. 隐含需求与边界条件
111	
112	- **绑定标签幂等性**：多次绑定同一标签不应产生重复记录（多对多表有联合主键保护）
113	- **解绑不存在的关联**：DELETE /articles/<id>/tags/<tag_id> 中，即使该标签未绑定到该文章，也应返回成功（注：此边界条件无对应测试覆盖，属于额外需求，需手动验证）
114	- **标签筛选优先级**：同时传递 tag 和 tag_id 参数时的行为未在测试中覆盖，可任选其一或合并
115	- **并发安全**：SQLite 在单线程模式下运行，无需考虑并发问题
116	- **空数据库状态**：GET /articles 和 GET /tags 在空数据库时应返回空列表
117

============================= test session starts ==============================

1	"""
2	T2-1 博客系统测试（多模块版本）
3	
4	测试标签 CRUD、文章绑定标签、按标签筛选文章。
5	"""
6	
7	import os
8	import sys
9	import pytest
10	
11	sys.path.insert(0, os.path.join(os.path.dirname(__file__), '..', 'starter'))
12	
13	from app import create_app, db
14	from models import Article, Tag
15	
16	
17	@pytest.fixture
18	def client():
19	    """创建测试客户端"""
20	    app = create_app()
21	    app.config['TESTING'] = True
22	    app.config['SQLALCHEMY_DATABASE_URI'] = 'sqlite:///:memory:'
23	
24	    with app.test_client() as c:
25	        with app.app_context():
26	            db.drop_all()
27	            db.create_all()
28	        yield c
29

31	@pytest.fixture
32	def sample_article(client):
33	    """创建一篇示例文章"""
34	    with client.application.app_context():
35	        a = Article(title='测试文章', body='文章内容')
36	        db.session.add(a)
37	        db.session.commit()
38	        return a.id
39	
40	
41	# ============================================================
42	# 文章接口测试
43	# ============================================================
44	
45	class TestArticleCRUD:
46	    def test_create_article(self, client):
47	        """创建文章"""
48	        resp = client.post('/articles', json={'title': 'Hello', 'body': 'World'})
49	        assert resp.status_code == 201
50	        assert resp.json['status'] == 'ok'
51	        assert resp.json['data']['title'] == 'Hello'
52	
53	    def test_list_articles(self, client):
54	        """列出所有文章"""
55	        client.post('/articles', json={'title': 'A1', 'body': 'B1'})
56	        client.post('/articles', json={'title': 'A2', 'body': 'B2'})
57	        resp = client.get('/articles')
58	        assert resp.status_code == 200
59	        assert len(resp.json['data']) == 2
60	
61	    def test_get_article(self, client):
62	        """获取单篇文章"""
63	        r = client.post('/articles', json={'title': 'Test', 'body': 'Body'})
64	        aid = r.json['data']['id']
65	        resp = client.get(f'/articles/{aid}')
66	        assert resp.status_code == 200
67	        assert resp.json['data']['title'] == 'Test'
68	
69	    def test_create_article_missing_fields(self, client):
70	        """缺少必填字段应失败"""
71	        resp = client.post('/articles', json={'title': 'X'})
72	        assert resp.status_code == 400
73	
74	
75	# ============================================================
76	# 标签 CRUD 测试
77	# ============================================================
78	
79	class TestTagCRUD:
80	    def test_create_tag(self, client):
81	        """创建标签"""
82	        resp = client.post('/tags', json={'name': 'Python'})
83	        assert resp.status_code == 201
84	        assert resp.json['data']['name'] == 'Python'
85	
86	    def test_create_tag_duplicate(self, client):
87	        """创建重复标签应失败"""
88	        client.post('/tags', json={'name': 'Python'})

96	
97	    def test_list_tags(self, client):

104	
105	    def test_update_tag(self, client):

128	class TestArticleTagBinding:
129	    def test_bind_tags_to_article(self, client, sample_article):

131	        t1 = client.post('/tags', json={'name': 'Python'}).json['data']

147	    def test_unbind_tag_from_article(self, client, sample_article):
148	        """解除文章与标签的关联"""
149	        t = client.post('/tags', json={'name': 'Python'}).json['data']
150	        client.post(f'/articles/{sample_article}/tags',
151	                   json={'tag_ids': [t['id']]})
152	        resp = client.delete(f'/articles/{sample_article}/tags/{t["id"]}')
153	        assert resp.status_code == 200
154	        tags = client.get(f'/articles/{sample_article}/tags').json['data']
155	        assert len(tags) == 0
156	
157	    def test_delete_tag_removes_bindings(self, client, sample_article):
158	        """删除标签时应同时解除与文章的关联"""
159	        t = client.post('/tags', json={'name': 'Python'}).json['data']
160	        client.post(f'/articles/{sample_article}/tags',
161	                   json={'tag_ids': [t['id']]})
162	        client.delete(f'/tags/{t["id"]}')
163	        tags = client.get(f'/articles/{sample_article}/tags').json['data']
164	        assert len(tags) == 0
165	
166	
167	# ============================================================
168	# 按标签筛选文章测试
169	# ============================================================
170	
171	class TestFilterArticlesByTag:
172	    def test_filter_by_tag_name(self, client):
173	        """按标签名称筛选文章"""
174	        a1 = client.post('/articles', json={'title': '文章1', 'body': '内容1'}).json['data']
175	        client.post('/articles', json={'title': '文章2', 'body': '内容2'})
176	        t = client.post('/tags', json={'name': 'Python'}).json['data']
177	        client.post(f'/articles/{a1["id"]}/tags', json={'tag_ids': [t['id']]})
178	
179	        resp = client.get('/articles?tag=Python')
180	        assert resp.status_code == 200
181	        assert len(resp.json['data']) == 1
182	        assert resp.json['data'][0]['title'] == '文章1'
183	
184	    def test_filter_by_tag_id(self, client):
185	        """按标签 ID 筛选文章"""
186	        a = client.post('/articles', json={'title': '文章A', 'body': '内容A'}).json['data']
187	        t = client.post('/tags', json={'name': 'Flask'}).json['data']
188	        client.post(f'/articles/{a["id"]}/tags', json={'tag_ids': [t['id']]})
189	
190	        resp = client.get(f'/articles?tag_id={t["id"]}')
191	        assert resp.status_code == 200
192	        assert len(resp.json['data']) == 1
193	
194	    def test_filter_no_match(self, client):
195	        """筛选无匹配结果时返回空列表"""
196	        client.post('/articles', json={'title': '文章', 'body': '内容'})
197	        resp = client.get('/articles?tag=NonExistent')
198	        assert resp.status_code == 200
199	        assert len(resp.json['data']) == 0
200	
201	    def test_no_filter_returns_all(self, client):
202	        """不传筛选参数时返回所有文章"""
203	        client.post('/articles', json={'title': '文章1', 'body': '内容1'})
204	        client.post('/articles', json={'title': '文章2', 'body': '内容2'})
205	        resp = client.get('/articles')
206	        assert len(resp.json['data']) == 2

1	"""
2	T2 Blog — Tag Routes
3	
4	Implement tag CRUD routes.
5	Register as a Flask Blueprint named 'tag_bp'.
6	
7	Requirements:
8	- POST /tags -> Create tag
9	  Request: {"name": str}
10	  Response: {"status": "ok", "data": {"id": int, "name": str}}
11	  Errors: 400 if name missing/empty, 409 if name already exists
12	
13	- GET /tags -> List all tags
14	  Response: {"status": "ok", "data": [{"id": int, "name": str}, ...]}
15	
16	- PUT /tags/<id> -> Update tag name
17	  Request: {"name": str}
18	  Response: {"status": "ok", "data": {"id": int, "name": str}}
19	  Errors: 404 if not found, 400 if name missing, 409 if duplicate name
20	
21	- DELETE /tags/<id> -> Delete tag (also removes all article-tag associations)
22	  Response: {"status": "ok", "data": {"message": "Tag deleted"}}
23	  Errors: 404 if not found
24	
25	IMPORTANT: Deleting a tag should cascade and remove all article-tag bindings
26	in the article_tags association table. This is used by routes_article.py.
27	"""
28	
29	from flask import Blueprint, request, jsonify
30	
31	from app import db
32	from models import Tag
33	
34	tag_bp = Blueprint('tag_bp', __name__)
35	
36	
37	def tag_to_dict(tag):
38	    """Serialize a Tag object to a dictionary."""
39	    return {"id": tag.id, "name": tag.name}
40	
41	
42	@tag_bp.route('/tags', methods=['POST'])
43	def create_tag():
44	    """Create a new tag.
45	
46	    Request body: {"name": "str"}
47	    - 400 if name is missing or empty/whitespace-only
48	    - 409 if a tag with the same name already exists
49	    - 201 on success
50	    """
51	    data = request.get_json(silent=True)
52	    name = data.get('name') if data else None
53	    if not name or not isinstance(name, str) or not name.strip():
54	        return jsonify({"status": "error", "message": "Tag name is required and must not be empty"}), 400
55	    name = name.strip()
56	
57	    if Tag.query.filter_by(name=name).first():
58	        return jsonify({"status": "error", "message": "Tag name already exists"}), 409
59	
60	    tag = Tag(name=name)
61	    db.session.add(tag)
62	    db.session.commit()
63	
64	    return jsonify({"status": "ok", "data": tag_to_dict(tag)}), 201
65	
66	
67	@tag_bp.route('/tags', methods=['GET'])
68	def list_tags():
69	    """List all tags.
70	
71	    Returns a list of all tags, or an empty list if none exist.
72	    """
73	    tags = Tag.query.all()
74	    return jsonify({"status": "ok", "data": [tag_to_dict(t) for t in tags]}), 200
75	
76	
77	@tag_bp.route('/tags/<int:id>', methods=['PUT'])
78	def update_tag(id):
79	    """Update a tag's name.
80	
81	    Request body: {"name": "str"}
82	    - 404 if tag with given id does not exist
83	    - 400 if name is missing or empty/whitespace-only
84	    - 409 if new name conflicts with another existing tag (excluding self)
85	    - 200 on success
86	    """
87	    tag = db.session.get(Tag, id)
88	    if not tag:
89	        return jsonify({"status": "error", "message": "Tag not found"}), 404
90	
91	    data = request.get_json(silent=True)
92	    name = data.get('name') if data else None
93	    if not name or not isinstance(name, str) or not name.strip():
94	        return jsonify({"status": "error", "message": "Tag name is required and must not be empty"}), 400
95	    name = name.strip()
96	
97	    duplicate = Tag.query.filter(Tag.name == name, Tag.id != id).first()
98	    if duplicate:
99	        return jsonify({"status": "error", "message": "Tag name already exists"}), 409
100	
101	    tag.name = name
102	    db.session.commit()
103	
104	    return jsonify({"status": "ok", "data": tag_to_dict(tag)}), 200
105	
106	
107	@tag_bp.route('/tags/<int:id>', methods=['DELETE'])
108	def delete_tag(id):
109	    """Delete a tag.
110	
111	    - 404 if tag with given id does not exist
112	    - 200 on success; cascade deletes article_tags associations automatically
113	    """
114	    tag = db.session.get(Tag, id)
115	    if not tag:
116	        return jsonify({"status": "error", "message": "Tag not found"}), 404
117	
118	    db.session.delete(tag)
119	    db.session.commit()
120	
121	    return jsonify({"status": "ok", "data": {"message": "Tag deleted"}}), 200
122

1	"""
2	T2 Blog — Article Routes
3	
4	Implement article CRUD and tag-binding routes.
5	Register as a Flask Blueprint named 'article_bp'.
6	
7	Requirements:
8	- GET /articles -> List all articles
9	  Optional query params: tag (filter by tag name), tag_id (filter by tag ID)
10	  Response: {"status": "ok", "data": [{"id": int, "title": str, "body": str}, ...]}
11	
12	- POST /articles -> Create article
13	  Request: {"title": str, "body": str}
14	  Response: {"status": "ok", "data": {"id": int, "title": str, "body": str}}
15	  Errors: 400 if title or body missing
16	
17	- GET /articles/<id> -> Get single article
18	  Response: {"status": "ok", "data": {"id": int, "title": str, "body": str}}
19	  Errors: 404 if not found
20	
21	- POST /articles/<id>/tags -> Bind tags to article
22	  Request: {"tag_ids": [int, ...]}
23	  Response: {"status": "ok", "data": {"message": "Tags bound"}}
24	  Errors: 404 if article not found, 400 if tag not found
25	
26	- GET /articles/<id>/tags -> Get article's tags
27	  Response: {"status": "ok", "data": [{"id": int, "name": str}, ...]}
28	  Errors: 404 if article not found
29	
30	- DELETE /articles/<id>/tags/<tag_id> -> Unbind tag from article
31	  Response: {"status": "ok", "data": {"message": "Tag unbound"}}
32	  Errors: 404 if article not found
33	
34	IMPORTANT: This module works with models.py (Article, Tag, article_tags) and
35	routes_tag.py. Make sure field names and response formats are consistent.
36	"""
37	
38	from flask import Blueprint, request, jsonify
39	
40	from app import db
41	from models import Article, Tag
42	
43	article_bp = Blueprint('article_bp', __name__)
44	
45	
46	def article_to_dict(article):
47	    """Serialize an Article object to a dictionary."""
48	    return {"id": article.id, "title": article.title, "body": article.body}
49	
50	
51	def tag_to_dict(tag):
52	    """Serialize a Tag object to a dictionary."""
53	    return {"id": tag.id, "name": tag.name}
54	
55	
56	# ============================================================
57	# POST /articles — 创建文章
58	# Design: 3.2 Section 1, FR-ART-01
59	# ============================================================
60	
61	@article_bp.route('/articles', methods=['POST'])
62	def create_article():
63	    """Create a new article.
64	
65	    Request body: {"title": "str", "body": "str"}
66	    - 400 if title or body is missing or empty/non-string
67	    - 201 on success
68	    """
69	    data = request.get_json(silent=True)
70	    if not data:
71	        return jsonify({"status": "error", "message": "Request body must be JSON"}), 400
72	
73	    title = data.get('title')
74	    body = data.get('body')
75	
76	    if not title or not isinstance(title, str) or not title.strip():
77	        return jsonify({"status": "error", "message": "title is required"}), 400
78	    if not body or not isinstance(body, str) or not body.strip():
79	        return jsonify({"status": "error", "message": "body is required"}), 400
80	
81	    article = Article(title=title.strip(), body=body.strip())
82	    db.session.add(article)
83	    db.session.commit()
84	
85	    return jsonify({"status": "ok", "data": article_to_dict(article)}), 201
86	
87	
88	# ============================================================
89	# GET /articles — 列出所有文章（支持标签筛选）
90	# Design: 3.2 Section 2, FR-ART-02
91	# ============================================================
92	
93	@article_bp.route('/articles', methods=['GET'])
94	def list_articles():
95	    """List all articles, optionally filtered by tag.
96	
97	    Query params:
98	    - tag_id: filter by tag ID (takes priority)
99	    - tag: filter by tag name (fallback if tag_id not provided)
100	    - No params: return all articles
101	    """
102	    tag_id = request.args.get('tag_id')
103	    tag_name = request.args.get('tag')
104	
105	    if tag_id:
106	        try:
107	            tag_id_int = int(tag_id)
108	        except (ValueError, TypeError):
109	            return jsonify({"status": "ok", "data": []}), 200
110	        tag = db.session.get(Tag, tag_id_int)
111	        articles = tag.articles.all() if tag else []
112	    elif tag_name:
113	        tag = Tag.query.filter_by(name=tag_name).first()
114	        articles = tag.articles.all() if tag else []
115	    else:
116	        articles = Article.query.all()
117	
118	    return jsonify({"status": "ok", "data": [article_to_dict(a) for a in articles]}), 200
119	
120	
121	# ============================================================
122	# GET /articles/<id> — 获取单篇文章
123	# Design: 3.2 Section 3, FR-ART-03
124	# ============================================================
125	
126	@article_bp.route('/articles/<int:id>', methods=['GET'])
127	def get_article(id):
128	    """Get a single article by ID.
129	
130	    - 404 if article not found
131	    - 200 on success
132	    """
133	    article = db.session.get(Article, id)
134	    if not article:
135	        return jsonify({"status": "error", "message": "Article not found"}), 404
136	
137	    return jsonify({"status": "ok", "data": article_to_dict(article)}), 200
138	
139	
140	# ============================================================
141	# POST /articles/<id>/tags — 为文章绑定标签
142	# Design: 3.2 Section 4, FR-ART-04
143	# ============================================================
144	
145	@article_bp.route('/articles/<int:id>/tags', methods=['POST'])
146	def bind_tags(id):
147	    """Bind tags to an article.
148	
149	    Request body: {"tag_ids": [int, ...]}
150	    - 404 if article not found
151	    - 400 if any tag_id in tag_ids does not exist
152	    - 200 on success (idempotent: already-bound tags are silently skipped)
153	    """
154	    article = db.session.get(Article, id)
155	    if not article:
156	        return jsonify({"status": "error", "message": "Article not found"}), 404
157	
158	    data = request.get_json(silent=True)
159	    if not data:
160	        return jsonify({"status": "error", "message": "Request body must be JSON"}), 400
161	
162	    tag_ids = data.get('tag_ids', [])
163	    if not isinstance(tag_ids, list):
164	        return jsonify({"status": "error", "message": "tag_ids must be a list"}), 400
165	
166	    tags = []
167	    for tid in tag_ids:
168	        tag = db.session.get(Tag, tid)
169	        if not tag:
170	            return jsonify({"status": "error", "message": f"Tag {tid} not found"}), 400
171	        if tag not in article.tags:  # idempotent: skip already-bound tags
172	            tags.append(tag)
173	
174	    if tags:
175	        article.tags.extend(tags)
176	        db.session.commit()
177	
178	    return jsonify({"status": "ok", "data": {"message": "Tags bound"}}), 200
179	
180	
181	# ============================================================
182	# GET /articles/<id>/tags — 获取文章的所有标签
183	# Design: 3.2 Section 5, FR-ART-05
184	# ============================================================
185	
186	@article_bp.route('/articles/<int:id>/tags', methods=['GET'])
187	def get_article_tags(id):
188	    """Get all tags bound to an article.
189	
190	    - 404 if article not found
191	    - 200 on success (returns list of tags, possibly empty)
192	    """
193	    article = db.session.get(Article, id)
194	    if not article:
195	        return jsonify({"status": "error", "message": "Article not found"}), 404
196	
197	    return jsonify({"status": "ok", "data": [tag_to_dict(t) for t in article.tags]}), 200
198	
199	
200	# ============================================================
201	# DELETE /articles/<id>/tags/<tag_id> — 解除关联
202	# Design: 3.2 Section 6, FR-ART-06
203	# ============================================================
204	
205	@article_bp.route('/articles/<int:id>/tags/<int:tag_id>', methods=['DELETE'])
206	def unbind_tag(id, tag_id):
207	    """Unbind a tag from an article.
208	
209	    - 404 if article not found
210	    - 200 on success even if the tag was not bound to the article
211	    """
212	    article = db.session.get(Article, id)
213	    if not article:
214	        return jsonify({"status": "error", "message": "Article not found"}), 404
215	
216	    tag = db.session.get(Tag, tag_id)
217	    if tag and tag in article.tags:
218	        article.tags.remove(tag)
219	        db.session.commit()
220	
221	    return jsonify({"status": "ok", "data": {"message": "Tag unbound"}}), 200
222

1	"""
2	T2 Blog — Data Models
3	
4	Define SQLAlchemy models here.
5	Requirements:
6	- Article: id, title (non-empty string), body (text)
7	- Tag: id, name (unique, non-null)
8	- article_tags: many-to-many association table
9	"""
10	
11	from flask_sqlalchemy import SQLAlchemy
12	import sys
13	import os
14	sys.path.insert(0, os.path.dirname(__file__))
15	
16	from app import db
17	
18	# Many-to-many association table
19	article_tags = db.Table('article_tags',
20	    db.Column('article_id', db.Integer, db.ForeignKey('article.id'), primary_key=True),
21	    db.Column('tag_id', db.Integer, db.ForeignKey('tag.id'), primary_key=True)
22	)
23	
24	
25	class Article(db.Model):
26	    id = db.Column(db.Integer, primary_key=True)
27	    title = db.Column(db.String(200), nullable=False)
28	    body = db.Column(db.Text, nullable=False)
29	    tags = db.relationship('Tag', secondary=article_tags,
30	                           backref=db.backref('articles', lazy='dynamic'))
31	
32	
33	class Tag(db.Model):
34	    id = db.Column(db.Integer, primary_key=True)
35	    name = db.Column(db.String(80), unique=True, nullable=False)
36

1	"""
2	T2 Blog — Flask App Factory & DB Initialization
3	
4	This file sets up the Flask app and database. DO NOT MODIFY this file.
5	All business logic goes in the other modules.
6	"""
7	
8	from flask import Flask
9	from flask_sqlalchemy import SQLAlchemy
10	import os
11	
12	db = SQLAlchemy()
13	
14	
15	def create_app():
16	    app = Flask(__name__)
17	    app.config['SQLALCHEMY_DATABASE_URI'] = 'sqlite:///blog.db'
18	    app.config['SQLALCHEMY_TRACK_MODIFICATIONS'] = False
19	
20	    db.init_app(app)
21	
22	    # Import and register models
23	    from models import Article, Tag
24	
25	    # Import and register route blueprints
26	    from routes_article import article_bp
27	    from routes_tag import tag_bp
28	    app.register_blueprint(article_bp)
29	    app.register_blueprint(tag_bp)
30	
31	    with app.app_context():
32	        db.create_all()
33	
34	    return app
35	
36	
37	if __name__ == '__main__':
38	    app = create_app()
39	    app.run(debug=True)
40

1	# T2-1：小型博客系统 — 文章标签管理 + 按标签筛选（多模块版本）
2	
3	## 项目结构
4	
5	```
6	starter/
7	  app.py              # Flask app 工厂 + DB 初始化（请勿修改）
8	  models.py           # 数据模型（Article, Tag, article_tags）—— 需要完善
9	  routes_article.py   # 文章路由 + 标签绑定 —— 需要实现
10	  routes_tag.py       # 标签 CRUD 路由 —— 需要实现
11	  requirements.txt    # 依赖
12	```
13	
14	## 重要提示
15	
16	这是一个**多模块项目**，代码分布在多个文件中。各模块之间有 import 依赖：
17	- `routes_article.py` 和 `routes_tag.py` 需要从 `models.py` 导入模型
18	- `app.py` 负责组装所有模块（请勿修改）
19	
20	**请确保各模块之间的接口（模型字段名、关联表名）保持一致。**
21	
22	## 功能要求
23	
24	### 1. 数据模型（models.py）
25	- Article 模型：id, title, body
26	- Tag 模型：id, name（唯一、非空）
27	- article_tags 多对多关联表
28	
29	### 2. 文章路由（routes_article.py）
30	使用 `article_bp = Blueprint('article_bp', __name__)`
31	- `GET /articles` → 列出所有文章（可选 `?tag=<name>` 或 `?tag_id=<id>` 筛选）
32	- `POST /articles` → 创建文章 `{"title": "...", "body": "..."}`
33	- `GET /articles/<id>` → 获取单篇文章
34	- `POST /articles/<id>/tags` → 绑定标签 `{"tag_ids": [1, 2]}`
35	- `GET /articles/<id>/tags` → 获取文章的所有标签
36	- `DELETE /articles/<id>/tags/<tag_id>` → 解除文章与标签的关联
37	
38	### 3. 标签路由（routes_tag.py）
39	使用 `tag_bp = Blueprint('tag_bp', __name__)`
40	- `POST /tags` → 创建标签（name 必填，不可重复）
41	- `GET /tags` → 获取所有标签列表
42	- `PUT /tags/<id>` → 编辑标签名称
43	- `DELETE /tags/<id>` → 删除标签（同时解除与文章的关联）
44	
45	### 接口返回格式
46	
47	成功时：
48	```json
49	{"status": "ok", "data": ...}
50	```
51	
52	错误时：
53	```json
54	{"status": "error", "message": "错误描述"}
55	```
56	
57	## 验收标准
58	
59	1. ✅ 所有上述 API 接口可正常调用
60	2. ✅ `tests/test_basic.py` 中的所有测试用例通过
61	3. ✅ 本文件（README.md）无需修改内容
62	
63	## 测试
64	
65	```bash
66	cd starter && pip install -r requirements.txt && cd .. && python -m pytest tests/ -v
67	```
68

## Waterfall Tester Verification Report

### 1. Acceptance Criteria Verification (requirements.md Section 5)

**AC-1: All 10 API endpoints callable with correct format and status codes** -- PASS

| # | Endpoint | Method | Status Code | Format | Verified |
|---|----------|--------|-------------|--------|----------|
| 1 | `/articles` | POST | 201 | `{"status":"ok","data":{"id","title","body"}}` | Yes |
| 2 | `/articles` | GET | 200 | `{"status":"ok","data":[...]}` | Yes |
| 3 | `/articles/<id>` | GET | 200 / 404 | `{"status":"ok","data":{...}}` / `{"status":"error","message":"..."}` | Yes |
| 4 | `/articles/<id>/tags` | POST | 200 / 404 / 400 | `{"status":"ok","data":{"message":"Tags bound"}}` | Yes |
| 5 | `/articles/<id>/tags` | GET | 200 / 404 | `{"status":"ok","data":[{"id","name"},...]}` | Yes |
| 6 | `/articles/<id>/tags/<tag_id>` | DELETE | 200 / 404 | `{"status":"ok","data":{"message":"Tag unbound"}}` | Yes |
| 7 | `/tags` | POST | 201 / 400 / 409 | `{"status":"ok","data":{"id","name"}}` | Yes |
| 8 | `/tags` | GET | 200 | `{"status":"ok","data":[{"id","name"},...]}` | Yes |
| 9 | `/tags/<id>` | PUT | 200 / 404 / 400 / 409 | `{"status":"ok","data":{"id","name"}}` | Yes |
| 10 | `/tags/<id>` | DELETE | 200 / 404 | `{"status":"ok","data":{"message":"Tag deleted"}}` | Yes |

**AC-2: All 18 test cases pass** -- PASS

See detailed breakdown in Section 2 below. All 18/18 pass.

**AC-3: README.md unmodified** -- PASS

README.md content matches the expected structure and验收标准. No modifications were made to `app.py` or `models.py` either, in compliance with the constraints.

---

### 2. Test Case Verification (18/18 PASS)

#### TestArticleCRUD (4/4 PASS)

| Test | What It Verifies | Result |
|------|-----------------|--------|
| `test_create_article` | POST /articles returns 201, status "ok", correct title | PASS |
| `test_list_articles` | POST 2 articles then GET /articles returns 200 with 2 items | PASS |
| `test_get_article` | Create article, GET /articles/<id> returns 200 with correct data | PASS |
| `test_create_article_missing_fields` | POST with only title (missing body) returns 400 | PASS |

#### TestTagCRUD (6/6 PASS)

| Test | What It Verifies | Result |
|------|-----------------|--------|
| `test_create_tag` | POST /tags returns 201, correct name | PASS |
| `test_create_tag_duplicate` | Second POST with same name returns 409 | PASS |
| `test_create_tag_no_name` | POST /tags with empty JSON returns 400 | PASS |
| `test_list_tags` | Create 2 tags, GET /tags returns 200 with 2 items | PASS |
| `test_update_tag` | PUT /tags/<id> with new name returns 200, updated name | PASS |
| `test_delete_tag` | DELETE /tags/<id> returns 200, subsequent list returns empty | PASS |

#### TestArticleTagBinding (4/4 PASS)

| Test | What It Verifies | Result |
|------|-----------------|--------|
| `test_bind_tags_to_article` | POST /articles/<id>/tags with 2 tag_ids returns 200 | PASS |
| `test_get_article_tags` | After binding, GET /articles/<id>/tags returns 200 with 1 tag, correct name | PASS |
| `test_unbind_tag_from_article` | After binding, DELETE /articles/<id>/tags/<tag_id> returns 200, tags list becomes empty | PASS |
| `test_delete_tag_removes_bindings` | After binding, DELETE /tags/<id> then GET /articles/<id>/tags returns empty (cascade) | PASS |

#### TestFilterArticlesByTag (4/4 PASS)

| Test | What It Verifies | Result |
|------|-----------------|--------|
| `test_filter_by_tag_name` | GET /articles?tag=Python returns only the tagged article | PASS |
| `test_filter_by_tag_id` | GET /articles?tag_id=<id> returns only the tagged article | PASS |
| `test_filter_no_match` | GET /articles?tag=NonExistent returns 200 with empty list | PASS |
| `test_no_filter_returns_all` | GET /articles (no params) returns all 2 articles (no status code assertion, only data length) | PASS |

---

### 3. Code Review -- Additional Verification

Beyond the 18 tests, I reviewed the implementation source for correctness against requirements:

**Input Validation (routes_article.py)**:
- `create_article`: Validates title and body are non-empty strings via `not title or not isinstance(title, str) or not title.strip()`. Returns 400 with error message. -- CORRECT
- `bind_tags`: Validates tag_ids is a list, and each tag_id exists via `db.session.get(Tag, tid)`. -- CORRECT
- `get_article`: Returns 404 for non-existent article. -- CORRECT

**Input Validation (routes_tag.py)**:
- `create_tag`: Validates name is present, string, non-whitespace. Checks uniqueness. -- CORRECT
- `update_tag`: Uses `Tag.query.filter(Tag.name == name, Tag.id != id).first()` to allow renaming to current name while blocking conflicts. -- CORRECT

**Idempotency (requirements.md Section 6)**:
- `bind_tags` in routes_article.py (line 171): `if tag not in article.tags` -- skips already-bound tags, preventing duplicate association table entries. -- CORRECT
- `unbind_tag` in routes_article.py (line 217): Returns 200 even if tag was not bound, per the requirement "解绑不存在的关联也应返回成功". -- CORRECT

**Cascade Delete (FR-TAG-04)**:
- `delete_tag` in routes_tag.py (line 118): `db.session.delete(tag)` -- SQLAlchemy cascade handles removing article_tags association records automatically due to the foreign key relationship. Verified by `test_delete_tag_removes_bindings`. -- CORRECT

**ORM API**:
- All code uses `db.session.get()` instead of the deprecated `Query.get()`, as noted in the developer handoff. -- CORRECT

**Blueprint Registration**:
- `article_bp = Blueprint('article_bp', __name__)` in routes_article.py -- matches app.py's `app.register_blueprint(article_bp)` with no url_prefix. -- CORRECT
- `tag_bp = Blueprint('tag_bp', __name__)` in routes_tag.py -- matches app.py's `app.register_blueprint(tag_bp)` with no url_prefix. -- CORRECT

**Response Format Consistency**:
- All success responses: `{"status": "ok", "data": ...}` -- CORRECT
- All error responses: `{"status": "error", "message": "..."}` -- CORRECT

---

### 4. Overall Assessment

**PASS -- Meets all delivery criteria.**

- 18/18 test cases pass (100% pass rate)
- All 10 API endpoints return correct status codes and response formats
- Input validation covers all specified error cases (missing fields, duplicates, not-found)
- Edge conditions (idempotent binding, unbind non-existent association, cascade delete) are properly handled
- No modifications to `app.py`, `models.py`, or `README.md`
- Code uses the non-deprecated `db.session.get()` API throughout
- Implementation is clean, well-documented, and follows the blueprint architecture constraints

# 测试验证报告 — T2-1 小型博客系统

## 1. 测试环境

- **测试框架**：pytest
- **测试命令**：`python -m pytest tests/ -v`
- **测试文件**：tests/test_basic.py
- **测试数据库**：SQLite 内存模式（:memory:）

## 2. 验收标准验证

### AC-1: 所有 API 接口可正常调用 — ✅ 通过

| # | 端点 | 方法 | 状态码 | 响应格式 |
|---|------|------|--------|----------|
| 1 | /articles | POST | 201 | {"status":"ok","data":{"id","title","body"}} |
| 2 | /articles | GET | 200 | {"status":"ok","data":[...]} |
| 3 | /articles/\<id\> | GET | 200/404 | {"status":"ok/error","data/message":...} |
| 4 | /articles/\<id\>/tags | POST | 200/404/400 | {"status":"ok/error","data/message":...} |
| 5 | /articles/\<id\>/tags | GET | 200/404 | {"status":"ok/error","data/message":...} |
| 6 | /articles/\<id\>/tags/\<tag_id\> | DELETE | 200/404 | {"status":"ok/error","data/message":...} |
| 7 | /tags | POST | 201/400/409 | {"status":"ok/error","data/message":...} |
| 8 | /tags | GET | 200 | {"status":"ok","data":[...]} |
| 9 | /tags/\<id\> | PUT | 200/404/400/409 | {"status":"ok/error","data/message":...} |
| 10 | /tags/\<id\> | DELETE | 200/404 | {"status":"ok/error","data/message":...} |

### AC-2: 所有 18 个测试用例通过 — ✅ 通过

**18/18 PASSED (100%)**

### AC-3: README.md 无需修改 — ✅ 通过

## 3. 测试用例详细结果

### TestArticleCRUD (4/4 PASS)

| 测试用例 | 验证需求 | 结果 |
|----------|---------|------|
| test_create_article | FR-ART-01 | PASS |
| test_list_articles | FR-ART-02 | PASS |
| test_get_article | FR-ART-03 | PASS |
| test_create_article_missing_fields | FR-ART-01 错误处理 | PASS |

### TestTagCRUD (6/6 PASS)

| 测试用例 | 验证需求 | 结果 |
|----------|---------|------|
| test_create_tag | FR-TAG-01 | PASS |
| test_create_tag_duplicate | FR-TAG-01 409 | PASS |
| test_create_tag_no_name | FR-TAG-01 400 | PASS |
| test_list_tags | FR-TAG-02 | PASS |
| test_update_tag | FR-TAG-03 | PASS |
| test_delete_tag | FR-TAG-04 | PASS |

### TestArticleTagBinding (4/4 PASS)

| 测试用例 | 验证需求 | 结果 |
|----------|---------|------|
| test_bind_tags_to_article | FR-ART-04 | PASS |
| test_get_article_tags | FR-ART-05 | PASS |
| test_unbind_tag_from_article | FR-ART-06 | PASS |
| test_delete_tag_removes_bindings | FR-TAG-04 级联 | PASS |

### TestFilterArticlesByTag (4/4 PASS)

| 测试用例 | 验证需求 | 结果 |
|----------|---------|------|
| test_filter_by_tag_name | FR-ART-02 tag 参数 | PASS |
| test_filter_by_tag_id | FR-ART-02 tag_id 参数 | PASS |
| test_filter_no_match | FR-ART-02 无匹配 | PASS |
| test_no_filter_returns_all | FR-ART-02 无参数 | PASS |

## 4. 边界条件验证

| 边界条件 | 结果 |
|----------|------|
| 绑定标签幂等性 | PASS — 重复绑定返回 200 |
| 解绑不存在的关联 | PASS — 幂等返回 200 |
| 空数据库 GET 请求 | PASS — 返回空列表 |
| 无效 tag_id 参数 | PASS — 返回空列表 |
| 纯空格 title/body/name | PASS — 返回 400 |
| 非字符串类型输入 | PASS — 返回 400 |
| 级联删除标签 | PASS — 关联自动清除 |

## 5. 已修复的问题

| 问题 | ATU | 修复内容 |
|------|-----|---------|
| Tag.query.get() 弃用警告 | ATU-003 | 替换为 db.session.get(Tag, id) |
| 空名检查缺少类型防御 | ATU-003 | 增加 isinstance(name, str) 检查 |
| 重复绑定标签返回 500 | ATU-004 | 增加 if tag not in article.tags 去重 |

## 6. 总体评估

**符合交付标准。** 18/18 测试通过，10/10 API 端点正常工作，3 条验收标准全部满足。

1	# 需求分析文档 — T2-1 小型博客系统
2	
3	## 1. 项目概述
4	
5	实现一个基于 Flask 的小型博客系统，支持文章管理、标签 CRUD、文章与标签的多对多绑定，以及按标签筛选文章。代码分布在多个模块中，需要保持模块间接口一致。
6	
7	## 2. 约束条件
8	
9	- **app.py 不可修改**：Flask 应用工厂和 DB 初始化已固定
10	- **多模块架构**：routes_article.py 和 routes_tag.py 需要从 models.py 导入模型
11	- **Blueprint 注册**：app.py 已完成 Blueprint 注册，路由文件必须定义正确的 Blueprint 实例
12	- **Blueprint 无 url_prefix**：app.py 中 `app.register_blueprint(article_bp)` 和 `app.register_blueprint(tag_bp)` 均未指定 url_prefix，因此路由文件中的端点路径必须与 README.md 中列出的完全一致（直接以 `/articles`、`/tags` 开头）
13	- **数据模型现状**：README.md 将 models.py 标记为"需要完善"，但经审查 models.py 中 Article、Tag、article_tags 的定义已包含所有必要字段（id, title, body, name, 多对多关联），当前模型定义完整。开发者需理解模型结构并确保路由实现与之一致，但无需修改 models.py
14	
15	## 3. 功能需求
16	
17	### 3.1 数据模型（已实现，开发者需理解其结构）
18	
19	- **Article**：id (PK), title (String 200, non-null), body (Text, non-null), tags (多对多关系)
20	- **Tag**：id (PK), name (String 80, unique, non-null), articles (反向多对多关系)
21	- **article_tags**：多对多关联表 (article_id, tag_id, 联合主键)
22	
23	**ORM 隐含需求**：测试文件 test_basic.py 中的 `sample_article` fixture 直接通过 SQLAlchemy ORM 操作数据库（`db.session.add()` / `db.session.commit()`）创建文章，而非通过 API 调用。因此 Article/Tag 模型必须支持标准构造函数初始化（如 `Article(title='...', body='...')`），且 `id` 字段须在 commit 后自动生成。
24	
25	### 3.2 文章路由（routes_article.py）
26	
27	#### FR-ART-01: 创建文章
28	- **端点**：`POST /articles`
29	- **请求体**：`{"title": "str", "body": "str"}`
30	- **成功响应** (201)：`{"status": "ok", "data": {"id": int, "title": str, "body": str}}`
31	- **错误响应** (400)：title 或 body 缺失时返回 `{"status": "error", "message": "..."}`
32	
33	#### FR-ART-02: 列出所有文章
34	- **端点**：`GET /articles`
35	- **查询参数（可选）**：
36	  - `tag=<name>` — 按标签名称筛选
37	  - `tag_id=<id>` — 按标签 ID 筛选
38	- **成功响应** (200)：`{"status": "ok", "data": [{"id": int, "title": str, "body": str}, ...]}`
39	- **无匹配时**：返回空列表 `[]`
40	
41	#### FR-ART-03: 获取单篇文章
42	- **端点**：`GET /articles/<id>`
43	- **成功响应** (200)：`{"status": "ok", "data": {"id": int, "title": str, "body": str}}`
44	- **错误响应** (404)：文章不存在时
45	
46	#### FR-ART-04: 为文章绑定标签
47	- **端点**：`POST /articles/<id>/tags`
48	- **请求体**：`{"tag_ids": [int, ...]}`
49	- **成功响应** (200)：`{"status": "ok", "data": {"message": "Tags bound"}}`
50	- **错误响应**：
51	  - 404：文章不存在
52	  - 400：tag_ids 中有不存在的标签 ID
53	
54	#### FR-ART-05: 获取文章的所有标签
55	- **端点**：`GET /articles/<id>/tags`
56	- **成功响应** (200)：`{"status": "ok", "data": [{"id": int, "name": str}, ...]}`
57	- **错误响应** (404)：文章不存在时
58	
59	#### FR-ART-06: 解除文章与标签的关联
60	- **端点**：`DELETE /articles/<id>/tags/<tag_id>`
61	- **成功响应** (200)：`{"status": "ok", "data": {"message": "Tag unbound"}}`
62	- **错误响应** (404)：文章不存在时
63	
64	### 3.3 标签路由（routes_tag.py）
65	
66	#### FR-TAG-01: 创建标签
67	- **端点**：`POST /tags`
68	- **请求体**：`{"name": "str"}`
69	- **成功响应** (201)：`{"status": "ok", "data": {"id": int, "name": str}}`
70	- **错误响应**：
71	  - 400：name 缺失或为空
72	  - 409：name 已存在（重复）
73	
74	#### FR-TAG-02: 获取所有标签
75	- **端点**：`GET /tags`
76	- **成功响应** (200)：`{"status": "ok", "data": [{"id": int, "name": str}, ...]}`
77	
78	#### FR-TAG-03: 编辑标签名称
79	- **端点**：`PUT /tags/<id>`
80	- **请求体**：`{"name": "str"}`
81	- **成功响应** (200)：`{"status": "ok", "data": {"id": int, "name": str}}`
82	- **错误响应**：
83	  - 404：标签不存在
84	  - 400：name 缺失
85	  - 409：name 与已有标签重复
86	
87	#### FR-TAG-04: 删除标签
88	- **端点**：`DELETE /tags/<id>`
89	- **成功响应** (200)：`{"status": "ok", "data": {"message": "Tag deleted"}}`
90	- **错误响应** (404)：标签不存在时
91	- **级联行为**：删除标签时必须同时解除与所有文章的关联（article_tags 表中的记录）
92	
93	## 4. 接口返回格式规范
94	
95	- **成功**：`{"status": "ok", "data": ...}`
96	- **错误**：`{"status": "error", "message": "错误描述"}`
97	
98	## 5. 验收标准
99	
100	1. 所有上述 10 个 API 接口可正常调用，返回格式和状态码符合规范
101	2. `tests/test_basic.py` 中所有 18 个测试用例全部通过：
102	   - TestArticleCRUD: 4 个（创建、列表、获取、缺少字段）
103	   - TestTagCRUD: 6 个（创建、重复、无名称、列表、编辑、删除）
104	   - TestArticleTagBinding: 4 个（绑定、获取、解绑、级联删除）
105	   - TestFilterArticlesByTag: 4 个（按名称筛选、按 ID 筛选、无匹配、全部返回）
106	3. README.md 无需修改
107	
108	**注**：`test_no_filter_returns_all` 是唯一一个未显式断言状态码的测试用例（仅断言数据长度），但实现时仍需确保 GET /articles 返回 200。
109	
110	## 6. 隐含需求与边界条件
111	
112	- **绑定标签幂等性**：多次绑定同一标签不应产生重复记录（多对多表有联合主键保护）
113	- **解绑不存在的关联**：DELETE /articles/<id>/tags/<tag_id> 中，即使该标签未绑定到该文章，也应返回成功（注：此边界条件无对应测试覆盖，属于额外需求，需手动验证）
114	- **标签筛选优先级**：同时传递 tag 和 tag_id 参数时的行为未在测试中覆盖，可任选其一或合并
115	- **并发安全**：SQLite 在单线程模式下运行，无需考虑并发问题
116	- **空数据库状态**：GET /articles 和 GET /tags 在空数据库时应返回空列表
117

1	"""
2	T2 Blog — Data Models
3	
4	Define SQLAlchemy models here.
5	Requirements:
6	- Article: id, title (non-empty string), body (text)
7	- Tag: id, name (unique, non-null)
8	- article_tags: many-to-many association table
9	"""
10	
11	from flask_sqlalchemy import SQLAlchemy
12	import sys
13	import os
14	sys.path.insert(0, os.path.dirname(__file__))
15	
16	from app import db
17	
18	# Many-to-many association table
19	article_tags = db.Table('article_tags',
20	    db.Column('article_id', db.Integer, db.ForeignKey('article.id'), primary_key=True),
21	    db.Column('tag_id', db.Integer, db.ForeignKey('tag.id'), primary_key=True)
22	)
23	
24	
25	class Article(db.Model):
26	    id = db.Column(db.Integer, primary_key=True)
27	    title = db.Column(db.String(200), nullable=False)
28	    body = db.Column(db.Text, nullable=False)
29	    tags = db.relationship('Tag', secondary=article_tags,
30	                           backref=db.backref('articles', lazy='dynamic'))
31	
32	
33	class Tag(db.Model):
34	    id = db.Column(db.Integer, primary_key=True)
35	    name = db.Column(db.String(80), unique=True, nullable=False)
