1	"""
2	T2 Blog — Article Routes
3	
4	Implement article CRUD and tag-binding routes.
5	Register as a Flask Blueprint named 'article_bp'.
6	
7	Requirements:
8	- GET /articles -> List all articles
9	  Optional query params: tag (filter by tag name), tag_id (filter by tag ID)
10	  Response: {"status": "ok", "data": [{"id": int, "title": str, "body": str}, ...]}
11	
12	- POST /articles -> Create article
13	  Request: {"title": str, "body": str}
14	  Response: {"status": "ok", "data": {"id": int, "title": str, "body": str}}
15	  Errors: 400 if title or body missing
16	
17	- GET /articles/<id> -> Get single article
18	  Response: {"status": "ok", "data": {"id": int, "title": str, "body": str}}
19	  Errors: 404 if not found
20	
21	- POST /articles/<id>/tags -> Bind tags to article
22	  Request: {"tag_ids": [int, ...]}
23	  Response: {"status": "ok", "data": {"message": "Tags bound"}}
24	  Errors: 404 if article not found, 400 if tag not found
25	
26	- GET /articles/<id>/tags -> Get article's tags
27	  Response: {"status": "ok", "data": [{"id": int, "name": str}, ...]}
28	  Errors: 404 if article not found
29	
30	- DELETE /articles/<id>/tags/<tag_id> -> Unbind tag from article
31	  Response: {"status": "ok", "data": {"message": "Tag unbound"}}
32	  Errors: 404 if article not found
33	
34	IMPORTANT: This module works with models.py (Article, Tag, article_tags) and
35	routes_tag.py. Make sure field names and response formats are consistent.
36	"""
37	
38	from flask import Blueprint, request, jsonify
39	
40	from app import db
41	from models import Article, Tag
42	
43	article_bp = Blueprint('article_bp', __name__)
44	
45	
46	def article_to_dict(article):
47	    """Serialize an Article object to a dictionary."""
48	    return {"id": article.id, "title": article.title, "body": article.body}
49	
50	
51	def tag_to_dict(tag):
52	    """Serialize a Tag object to a dictionary."""
53	    return {"id": tag.id, "name": tag.name}
54	
55	
56	# ============================================================
57	# POST /articles — 创建文章
58	# Design: 3.2 Section 1, FR-ART-01
59	# ============================================================
60	
61	@article_bp.route('/articles', methods=['POST'])
62	def create_article():
63	    """Create a new article.
64	
65	    Request body: {"title": "str", "body": "str"}
66	    - 400 if title or body is missing or empty/non-string
67	    - 201 on success
68	    """
69	    data = request.get_json(silent=True)
70	    if not data:
71	        return jsonify({"status": "error", "message": "Request body must be JSON"}), 400
72	
73	    title = data.get('title')
74	    body = data.get('body')
75	
76	    if not title or not isinstance(title, str) or not title.strip():
77	        return jsonify({"status": "error", "message": "title is required"}), 400
78	    if not body or not isinstance(body, str) or not body.strip():
79	        return jsonify({"status": "error", "message": "body is required"}), 400
80	
81	    article = Article(title=title.strip(), body=body.strip())
82	    db.session.add(article)
83	    db.session.commit()
84	
85	    return jsonify({"status": "ok", "data": article_to_dict(article)}), 201
86	
87	
88	# ============================================================
89	# GET /articles — 列出所有文章（支持标签筛选）
90	# Design: 3.2 Section 2, FR-ART-02
91	# ============================================================
92	
93	@article_bp.route('/articles', methods=['GET'])
94	def list_articles():
95	    """List all articles, optionally filtered by tag.
96	
97	    Query params:
98	    - tag_id: filter by tag ID (takes priority)
99	    - tag: filter by tag name (fallback if tag_id not provided)
100	    - No params: return all articles
101	    """
102	    tag_id = request.args.get('tag_id')
103	    tag_name = request.args.get('tag')
104	
105	    if tag_id:
106	        try:
107	            tag_id_int = int(tag_id)
108	        except (ValueError, TypeError):
109	            return jsonify({"status": "ok", "data": []}), 200
110	        tag = db.session.get(Tag, tag_id_int)
111	        articles = tag.articles.all() if tag else []
112	    elif tag_name:
113	        tag = Tag.query.filter_by(name=tag_name).first()
114	        articles = tag.articles.all() if tag else []
115	    else:
116	        articles = Article.query.all()
117	
118	    return jsonify({"status": "ok", "data": [article_to_dict(a) for a in articles]}), 200
119	
120	
121	# ============================================================
122	# GET /articles/<id> — 获取单篇文章
123	# Design: 3.2 Section 3, FR-ART-03
124	# ============================================================
125	
126	@article_bp.route('/articles/<int:id>', methods=['GET'])
127	def get_article(id):
128	    """Get a single article by ID.
129	
130	    - 404 if article not found
131	    - 200 on success
132	    """
133	    article = db.session.get(Article, id)
134	    if not article:
135	        return jsonify({"status": "error", "message": "Article not found"}), 404
136	
137	    return jsonify({"status": "ok", "data": article_to_dict(article)}), 200
138	
139	
140	# ============================================================
141	# POST /articles/<id>/tags — 为文章绑定标签
142	# Design: 3.2 Section 4, FR-ART-04
143	# ============================================================
144	
145	@article_bp.route('/articles/<int:id>/tags', methods=['POST'])
146	def bind_tags(id):
147	    """Bind tags to an article.
148	
149	    Request body: {"tag_ids": [int, ...]}
150	    - 404 if article not found
151	    - 400 if any tag_id in tag_ids does not exist
152	    - 200 on success (idempotent: already-bound tags are silently skipped)
153	    """
154	    article = db.session.get(Article, id)
155	    if not article:
156	        return jsonify({"status": "error", "message": "Article not found"}), 404
157	
158	    data = request.get_json(silent=True)
159	    if not data:
160	        return jsonify({"status": "error", "message": "Request body must be JSON"}), 400
161	
162	    tag_ids = data.get('tag_ids', [])
163	    if not isinstance(tag_ids, list):
164	        return jsonify({"status": "error", "message": "tag_ids must be a list"}), 400
165	
166	    tags = []
167	    for tid in tag_ids:
168	        tag = db.session.get(Tag, tid)
169	        if not tag:
170	            return jsonify({"status": "error", "message": f"Tag {tid} not found"}), 400
171	        if tag not in article.tags:  # idempotent: skip already-bound tags
172	            tags.append(tag)
173	
174	    if tags:
175	        article.tags.extend(tags)
176	        db.session.commit()
177	
178	    return jsonify({"status": "ok", "data": {"message": "Tags bound"}}), 200
179	
180	
181	# ============================================================
182	# GET /articles/<id>/tags — 获取文章的所有标签
183	# Design: 3.2 Section 5, FR-ART-05
184	# ============================================================
185	
186	@article_bp.route('/articles/<int:id>/tags', methods=['GET'])
187	def get_article_tags(id):
188	    """Get all tags bound to an article.
189	
190	    - 404 if article not found
191	    - 200 on success (returns list of tags, possibly empty)
192	    """
193	    article = db.session.get(Article, id)
194	    if not article:
195	        return jsonify({"status": "error", "message": "Article not found"}), 404
196	
197	    return jsonify({"status": "ok", "data": [tag_to_dict(t) for t in article.tags]}), 200
198	
199	
200	# ============================================================
201	# DELETE /articles/<id>/tags/<tag_id> — 解除关联
202	# Design: 3.2 Section 6, FR-ART-06
203	# ============================================================
204	
205	@article_bp.route('/articles/<int:id>/tags/<int:tag_id>', methods=['DELETE'])
206	def unbind_tag(id, tag_id):
207	    """Unbind a tag from an article.
208	
209	    - 404 if article not found
210	    - 200 on success even if the tag was not bound to the article
211	    """
212	    article = db.session.get(Article, id)
213	    if not article:
214	        return jsonify({"status": "error", "message": "Article not found"}), 404
215	
216	    tag = db.session.get(Tag, tag_id)
217	    if tag and tag in article.tags:
218	        article.tags.remove(tag)
219	        db.session.commit()
220	
221	    return jsonify({"status": "ok", "data": {"message": "Tag unbound"}}), 200

1	"""
2	T2 Blog — Tag Routes
3	
4	Implement tag CRUD routes.
5	Register as a Flask Blueprint named 'tag_bp'.
6	
7	Requirements:
8	- POST /tags -> Create tag
9	  Request: {"name": str}
10	  Response: {"status": "ok", "data": {"id": int, "name": str}}
11	  Errors: 400 if name missing/empty, 409 if name already exists
12	
13	- GET /tags -> List all tags
14	  Response: {"status": "ok", "data": [{"id": int, "name": str}, ...]}
15	
16	- PUT /tags/<id> -> Update tag name
17	  Request: {"name": str}
18	  Response: {"status": "ok", "data": {"id": int, "name": str}}
19	  Errors: 404 if not found, 400 if name missing, 409 if duplicate name
20	
21	- DELETE /tags/<id> -> Delete tag (also removes all article-tag associations)
22	  Response: {"status": "ok", "data": {"message": "Tag deleted"}}
23	  Errors: 404 if not found
24	
25	IMPORTANT: Deleting a tag should cascade and remove all article-tag bindings
26	in the article_tags association table. This is used by routes_article.py.
27	"""
28	
29	from flask import Blueprint, request, jsonify
30	
31	from app import db
32	from models import Tag
33	
34	tag_bp = Blueprint('tag_bp', __name__)
35	
36	
37	def tag_to_dict(tag):
38	    """Serialize a Tag object to a dictionary."""
39	    return {"id": tag.id, "name": tag.name}
40	
41	
42	@tag_bp.route('/tags', methods=['POST'])
43	def create_tag():
44	    """Create a new tag.
45	
46	    Request body: {"name": "str"}
47	    - 400 if name is missing or empty/whitespace-only
48	    - 409 if a tag with the same name already exists
49	    - 201 on success
50	    """
51	    data = request.get_json(silent=True)
52	    name = data.get('name') if data else None
53	    if not name or not isinstance(name, str) or not name.strip():
54	        return jsonify({"status": "error", "message": "Tag name is required and must not be empty"}), 400
55	    name = name.strip()
56	
57	    if Tag.query.filter_by(name=name).first():
58	        return jsonify({"status": "error", "message": "Tag name already exists"}), 409
59	
60	    tag = Tag(name=name)
61	    db.session.add(tag)
62	    db.session.commit()
63	
64	    return jsonify({"status": "ok", "data": tag_to_dict(tag)}), 201
65	
66	
67	@tag_bp.route('/tags', methods=['GET'])
68	def list_tags():
69	    """List all tags.
70	
71	    Returns a list of all tags, or an empty list if none exist.
72	    """
73	    tags = Tag.query.all()
74	    return jsonify({"status": "ok", "data": [tag_to_dict(t) for t in tags]}), 200
75	
76	
77	@tag_bp.route('/tags/<int:id>', methods=['PUT'])
78	def update_tag(id):
79	    """Update a tag's name.
80	
81	    Request body: {"name": "str"}
82	    - 404 if tag with given id does not exist
83	    - 400 if name is missing or empty/whitespace-only
84	    - 409 if new name conflicts with another existing tag (excluding self)
85	    - 200 on success
86	    """
87	    tag = db.session.get(Tag, id)
88	    if not tag:
89	        return jsonify({"status": "error", "message": "Tag not found"}), 404
90	
91	    data = request.get_json(silent=True)
92	    name = data.get('name') if data else None
93	    if not name or not isinstance(name, str) or not name.strip():
94	        return jsonify({"status": "error", "message": "Tag name is required and must not be empty"}), 400
95	    name = name.strip()
96	
97	    duplicate = Tag.query.filter(Tag.name == name, Tag.id != id).first()
98	    if duplicate:
99	        return jsonify({"status": "error", "message": "Tag name already exists"}), 409
100	
101	    tag.name = name
102	    db.session.commit()
103	
104	    return jsonify({"status": "ok", "data": tag_to_dict(tag)}), 200
105	
106	
107	@tag_bp.route('/tags/<int:id>', methods=['DELETE'])
108	def delete_tag(id):
109	    """Delete a tag.
110	
111	    - 404 if tag with given id does not exist
112	    - 200 on success; cascade deletes article_tags associations automatically
113	    """
114	    tag = db.session.get(Tag, id)
115	    if not tag:
116	        return jsonify({"status": "error", "message": "Tag not found"}), 404
117	
118	    db.session.delete(tag)
119	    db.session.commit()
120	
121	    return jsonify({"status": "ok", "data": {"message": "Tag deleted"}}), 200
122

1	"""
2	T2 Blog — Flask App Factory & DB Initialization
3	
4	This file sets up the Flask app and database. DO NOT MODIFY this file.
5	All business logic goes in the other modules.
6	"""
7	
8	from flask import Flask
9	from flask_sqlalchemy import SQLAlchemy
10	import os
11	
12	db = SQLAlchemy()
13	
14	
15	def create_app():
16	    app = Flask(__name__)
17	    app.config['SQLALCHEMY_DATABASE_URI'] = 'sqlite:///blog.db'
18	    app.config['SQLALCHEMY_TRACK_MODIFICATIONS'] = False
19	
20	    db.init_app(app)
21	
22	    # Import and register models
23	    from models import Article, Tag
24	
25	    # Import and register route blueprints
26	    from routes_article import article_bp
27	    from routes_tag import tag_bp
28	    app.register_blueprint(article_bp)
29	    app.register_blueprint(tag_bp)
30	
31	    with app.app_context():
32	        db.create_all()
33	
34	    return app
35	
36	
37	if __name__ == '__main__':
38	    app = create_app()
39	    app.run(debug=True)

lines: "description": "编写 delivery-summary.md 总结实现情况，Reviewer 最终验收",

input.content:
# 交付总结 — T2-1 小型博客系统

## 1. 项目概况

| 项目 | 内容 |
|------|------|
| 项目名称 | T2-1 小型博客系统 — 文章标签管理 + 按标签筛选 |
| 方法论 | Waterfall（瀑布式项目管理） |
| 总 ATU 数 | 6 |
| 返工次数 | 2（ATU-003 返工 1 次，ATU-004 返工 1 次） |

## 2. 实现的功能列表

### 标签路由（routes_tag.py）— 4 个端点

| 端点 | 功能 | 状态码 |
|------|------|--------|
| POST /tags | 创建标签（name 必填唯一） | 201 / 400 / 409 |
| GET /tags | 获取所有标签列表 | 200 |
| PUT /tags/\<id\> | 编辑标签名称 | 200 / 404 / 400 / 409 |
| DELETE /tags/\<id\> | 删除标签（级联解除关联） | 200 / 404 |

### 文章路由（routes_article.py）— 6 个端点

| 端点 | 功能 | 状态码 |
|------|------|--------|
| POST /articles | 创建文章（title/body 必填） | 201 / 400 |
| GET /articles | 列出文章（支持 ?tag= 和 ?tag_id= 筛选） | 200 |
| GET /articles/\<id\> | 获取单篇文章 | 200 / 404 |
| POST /articles/\<id\>/tags | 为文章绑定标签（幂等） | 200 / 404 / 400 |
| GET /articles/\<id\>/tags | 获取文章的所有标签 | 200 / 404 |
| DELETE /articles/\<id\>/tags/\<tag_id\> | 解除关联（幂等） | 200 / 404 |

## 3. 修改的文件

| 文件 | 操作 | 说明 |
|------|------|------|
| starter/routes_tag.py | 修改 | 实现标签 CRUD 4 个端点 |
| starter/routes_article.py | 修改 | 实现文章 CRUD + 标签绑定/筛选 6 个端点 |
| starter/app.py | 未修改 | 按约束保持不变 |
| starter/models.py | 未修改 | 数据模型已完整 |

## 4. 测试覆盖情况

- **测试框架**：pytest
- **总测试用例**：18
- **通过**：18（100%）
- **失败**：0

| 测试类 | 用例数 | 通过 |
|--------|--------|------|
| TestArticleCRUD | 4 | 4 |
| TestTagCRUD | 6 | 6 |
| TestArticleTagBinding | 4 | 4 |
| TestFilterArticlesByTag | 4 | 4 |

## 5. 阶段执行总结

| 阶段 | ATU | 状态 | 返工次数 |
|------|-----|------|---------|
| 需求分析 | ATU-001 | Done | 0（首次退回后修正再通过） |
| 方案设计 | ATU-002 | Done | 0 |
| 开发实现 | ATU-003 | Done | 1（弃用 API + 类型防御） |
| 开发实现 | ATU-004 | Done | 1（幂等绑定缺陷） |
| 测试验证 | ATU-005 | Done | 0 |
| 最终交付 | ATU-006 | Done | — |

## 6. 已知问题与改进建议

### 无已知阻塞问题

所有 18 个测试用例全部通过，3 条验收标准全部满足。

### 改进建议（非阻塞）

1. **分页支持**：GET /articles 和 GET /tags 目前返回全部数据，大量数据时可考虑分页
2. **批量操作**：POST /articles 可扩展为支持批量创建
3. **标签统计**：可增加 GET /tags 返回每个标签下的文章数量
4. **持久化会话**：当前为内存 SQLite，可考虑配置外部数据库

1	# T2-1：小型博客系统 — 文章标签管理 + 按标签筛选（多模块版本）
2	
3	## 项目结构
4	
5	```
6	starter/
7	  app.py              # Flask app 工厂 + DB 初始化（请勿修改）
8	  models.py           # 数据模型（Article, Tag, article_tags）—— 需要完善
9	  routes_article.py   # 文章路由 + 标签绑定 —— 需要实现
10	  routes_tag.py       # 标签 CRUD 路由 —— 需要实现
11	  requirements.txt    # 依赖
12	```
13	
14	## 重要提示
15	
16	这是一个**多模块项目**，代码分布在多个文件中。各模块之间有 import 依赖：
17	- `routes_article.py` 和 `routes_tag.py` 需要从 `models.py` 导入模型
18	- `app.py` 负责组装所有模块（请勿修改）
19	
20	**请确保各模块之间的接口（模型字段名、关联表名）保持一致。**
21	
22	## 功能要求
23	
24	### 1. 数据模型（models.py）
25	- Article 模型：id, title, body
26	- Tag 模型：id, name（唯一、非空）
27	- article_tags 多对多关联表
28	
29	### 2. 文章路由（routes_article.py）
30	使用 `article_bp = Blueprint('article_bp', __name__)`
31	- `GET /articles` → 列出所有文章（可选 `?tag=<name>` 或 `?tag_id=<id>` 筛选）
32	- `POST /articles` → 创建文章 `{"title": "...", "body": "..."}`
33	- `GET /articles/<id>` → 获取单篇文章
34	- `POST /articles/<id>/tags` → 绑定标签 `{"tag_ids": [1, 2]}`
35	- `GET /articles/<id>/tags` → 获取文章的所有标签
36	- `DELETE /articles/<id>/tags/<tag_id>` → 解除文章与标签的关联
37	
38	### 3. 标签路由（routes_tag.py）
39	使用 `tag_bp = Blueprint('tag_bp', __name__)`
40	- `POST /tags` → 创建标签（name 必填，不可重复）
41	- `GET /tags` → 获取所有标签列表
42	- `PUT /tags/<id>` → 编辑标签名称
43	- `DELETE /tags/<id>` → 删除标签（同时解除与文章的关联）
44	
45	### 接口返回格式
46	
47	成功时：
48	```json
49	{"status": "ok", "data": ...}
50	```
51	
52	错误时：
53	```json
54	{"status": "error", "message": "错误描述"}
55	```
56	
57	## 验收标准
58	
59	1. ✅ 所有上述 API 接口可正常调用
60	2. ✅ `tests/test_basic.py` 中的所有测试用例通过
61	3. ✅ 本文件（README.md）无需修改内容
62	
63	## 测试
64	
65	```bash
66	cd starter && pip install -r requirements.txt && cd .. && python -m pytest tests/ -v
67	```
68

1	# 需求分析文档 — T2-1 小型博客系统
2	
3	## 1. 项目概述
4	
5	实现一个基于 Flask 的小型博客系统，支持文章管理、标签 CRUD、文章与标签的多对多绑定，以及按标签筛选文章。代码分布在多个模块中，需要保持模块间接口一致。
6	
7	## 2. 约束条件
8	
9	- **app.py 不可修改**：Flask 应用工厂和 DB 初始化已固定
10	- **多模块架构**：routes_article.py 和 routes_tag.py 需要从 models.py 导入模型
11	- **Blueprint 注册**：app.py 已完成 Blueprint 注册，路由文件必须定义正确的 Blueprint 实例
12	- **Blueprint 无 url_prefix**：app.py 中 `app.register_blueprint(article_bp)` 和 `app.register_blueprint(tag_bp)` 均未指定 url_prefix，因此路由文件中的端点路径必须与 README.md 中列出的完全一致（直接以 `/articles`、`/tags` 开头）
13	- **数据模型现状**：README.md 将 models.py 标记为"需要完善"，但经审查 models.py 中 Article、Tag、article_tags 的定义已包含所有必要字段（id, title, body, name, 多对多关联），当前模型定义完整。开发者需理解模型结构并确保路由实现与之一致，但无需修改 models.py
14	
15	## 3. 功能需求
16	
17	### 3.1 数据模型（已实现，开发者需理解其结构）
18	
19	- **Article**：id (PK), title (String 200, non-null), body (Text, non-null), tags (多对多关系)
20	- **Tag**：id (PK), name (String 80, unique, non-null), articles (反向多对多关系)
21	- **article_tags**：多对多关联表 (article_id, tag_id, 联合主键)
22	
23	**ORM 隐含需求**：测试文件 test_basic.py 中的 `sample_article` fixture 直接通过 SQLAlchemy ORM 操作数据库（`db.session.add()` / `db.session.commit()`）创建文章，而非通过 API 调用。因此 Article/Tag 模型必须支持标准构造函数初始化（如 `Article(title='...', body='...')`），且 `id` 字段须在 commit 后自动生成。
24	
25	### 3.2 文章路由（routes_article.py）
26	
27	#### FR-ART-01: 创建文章
28	- **端点**：`POST /articles`
29	- **请求体**：`{"title": "str", "body": "str"}`
30	- **成功响应** (201)：`{"status": "ok", "data": {"id": int, "title": str, "body": str}}`
31	- **错误响应** (400)：title 或 body 缺失时返回 `{"status": "error", "message": "..."}`
32	
33	#### FR-ART-02: 列出所有文章
34	- **端点**：`GET /articles`
35	- **查询参数（可选）**：
36	  - `tag=<name>` — 按标签名称筛选
37	  - `tag_id=<id>` — 按标签 ID 筛选
38	- **成功响应** (200)：`{"status": "ok", "data": [{"id": int, "title": str, "body": str}, ...]}`
39	- **无匹配时**：返回空列表 `[]`
40	
41	#### FR-ART-03: 获取单篇文章
42	- **端点**：`GET /articles/<id>`
43	- **成功响应** (200)：`{"status": "ok", "data": {"id": int, "title": str, "body": str}}`
44	- **错误响应** (404)：文章不存在时
45	
46	#### FR-ART-04: 为文章绑定标签
47	- **端点**：`POST /articles/<id>/tags`
48	- **请求体**：`{"tag_ids": [int, ...]}`
49	- **成功响应** (200)：`{"status": "ok", "data": {"message": "Tags bound"}}`
50	- **错误响应**：
51	  - 404：文章不存在
52	  - 400：tag_ids 中有不存在的标签 ID
53	
54	#### FR-ART-05: 获取文章的所有标签
55	- **端点**：`GET /articles/<id>/tags`
56	- **成功响应** (200)：`{"status": "ok", "data": [{"id": int, "name": str}, ...]}`
57	- **错误响应** (404)：文章不存在时
58	
59	#### FR-ART-06: 解除文章与标签的关联
60	- **端点**：`DELETE /articles/<id>/tags/<tag_id>`
61	- **成功响应** (200)：`{"status": "ok", "data": {"message": "Tag unbound"}}`
62	- **错误响应** (404)：文章不存在时
63	
64	### 3.3 标签路由（routes_tag.py）
65	
66	#### FR-TAG-01: 创建标签
67	- **端点**：`POST /tags`
68	- **请求体**：`{"name": "str"}`
69	- **成功响应** (201)：`{"status": "ok", "data": {"id": int, "name": str}}`
70	- **错误响应**：
71	  - 400：name 缺失或为空
72	  - 409：name 已存在（重复）
73	
74	#### FR-TAG-02: 获取所有标签
75	- **端点**：`GET /tags`
76	- **成功响应** (200)：`{"status": "ok", "data": [{"id": int, "name": str}, ...]}`
77	
78	#### FR-TAG-03: 编辑标签名称
79	- **端点**：`PUT /tags/<id>`
80	- **请求体**：`{"name": "str"}`
81	- **成功响应** (200)：`{"status": "ok", "data": {"id": int, "name": str}}`
82	- **错误响应**：
83	  - 404：标签不存在
84	  - 400：name 缺失
85	  - 409：name 与已有标签重复
86	
87	#### FR-TAG-04: 删除标签
88	- **端点**：`DELETE /tags/<id>`
89	- **成功响应** (200)：`{"status": "ok", "data": {"message": "Tag deleted"}}`
90	- **错误响应** (404)：标签不存在时
91	- **级联行为**：删除标签时必须同时解除与所有文章的关联（article_tags 表中的记录）
92	
93	## 4. 接口返回格式规范
94	
95	- **成功**：`{"status": "ok", "data": ...}`
96	- **错误**：`{"status": "error", "message": "错误描述"}`
97	
98	## 5. 验收标准
99	
100	1. 所有上述 10 个 API 接口可正常调用，返回格式和状态码符合规范
101	2. `tests/test_basic.py` 中所有 18 个测试用例全部通过：
102	   - TestArticleCRUD: 4 个（创建、列表、获取、缺少字段）
103	   - TestTagCRUD: 6 个（创建、重复、无名称、列表、编辑、删除）
104	   - TestArticleTagBinding: 4 个（绑定、获取、解绑、级联删除）
105	   - TestFilterArticlesByTag: 4 个（按名称筛选、按 ID 筛选、无匹配、全部返回）
106	3. README.md 无需修改
107	
108	**注**：`test_no_filter_returns_all` 是唯一一个未显式断言状态码的测试用例（仅断言数据长度），但实现时仍需确保 GET /articles 返回 200。
109	
110	## 6. 隐含需求与边界条件
111	
112	- **绑定标签幂等性**：多次绑定同一标签不应产生重复记录（多对多表有联合主键保护）
113	- **解绑不存在的关联**：DELETE /articles/<id>/tags/<tag_id> 中，即使该标签未绑定到该文章，也应返回成功（注：此边界条件无对应测试覆盖，属于额外需求，需手动验证）
114	- **标签筛选优先级**：同时传递 tag 和 tag_id 参数时的行为未在测试中覆盖，可任选其一或合并
115	- **并发安全**：SQLite 在单线程模式下运行，无需考虑并发问题
116	- **空数据库状态**：GET /articles 和 GET /tags 在空数据库时应返回空列表
117

1	"""
2	T2 Blog — Tag Routes
3	
4	Implement tag CRUD routes.
5	Register as a Flask Blueprint named 'tag_bp'.
6	
7	Requirements:
8	- POST /tags -> Create tag
9	  Request: {"name": str}
10	  Response: {"status": "ok", "data": {"id": int, "name": str}}
11	  Errors: 400 if name missing/empty, 409 if name already exists
12	
13	- GET /tags -> List all tags
14	  Response: {"status": "ok", "data": [{"id": int, "name": str}, ...]}
15	
16	- PUT /tags/<id> -> Update tag name
17	  Request: {"name": str}
18	  Response: {"status": "ok", "data": {"id": int, "name": str}}
19	  Errors: 404 if not found, 400 if name missing, 409 if duplicate name
20	
21	- DELETE /tags/<id> -> Delete tag (also removes all article-tag associations)
22	  Response: {"status": "ok", "data": {"message": "Tag deleted"}}
23	  Errors: 404 if not found
24	
25	IMPORTANT: Deleting a tag should cascade and remove all article-tag bindings
26	in the article_tags association table. This is used by routes_article.py.
27	"""
28	
29	from flask import Blueprint, request, jsonify
30	
31	from app import db
32	from models import Tag
33	
34	tag_bp = Blueprint('tag_bp', __name__)
35	
36	
37	def tag_to_dict(tag):
38	    """Serialize a Tag object to a dictionary."""
39	    return {"id": tag.id, "name": tag.name}
40	
41	
42	@tag_bp.route('/tags', methods=['POST'])
43	def create_tag():
44	    """Create a new tag.
45	
46	    Request body: {"name": "str"}
47	    - 400 if name is missing or empty/whitespace-only
48	    - 409 if a tag with the same name already exists
49	    - 201 on success
50	    """
51	    data = request.get_json(silent=True)
52	    name = data.get('name') if data else None
53	    if not name or not isinstance(name, str) or not name.strip():
54	        return jsonify({"status": "error", "message": "Tag name is required and must not be empty"}), 400
55	    name = name.strip()
56	
57	    if Tag.query.filter_by(name=name).first():
58	        return jsonify({"status": "error", "message": "Tag name already exists"}), 409
59	
60	    tag = Tag(name=name)
61	    db.session.add(tag)
62	    db.session.commit()
63	
64	    return jsonify({"status": "ok", "data": tag_to_dict(tag)}), 201
65	
66	
67	@tag_bp.route('/tags', methods=['GET'])
68	def list_tags():
69	    """List all tags.
70	
71	    Returns a list of all tags, or an empty list if none exist.
72	    """
73	    tags = Tag.query.all()
74	    return jsonify({"status": "ok", "data": [tag_to_dict(t) for t in tags]}), 200
75	
76	
77	@tag_bp.route('/tags/<int:id>', methods=['PUT'])
78	def update_tag(id):
79	    """Update a tag's name.
80	
81	    Request body: {"name": "str"}
82	    - 404 if tag with given id does not exist
83	    - 400 if name is missing or empty/whitespace-only
84	    - 409 if new name conflicts with another existing tag (excluding self)
85	    - 200 on success
86	    """
87	    tag = db.session.get(Tag, id)
88	    if not tag:
89	        return jsonify({"status": "error", "message": "Tag not found"}), 404
90	
91	    data = request.get_json(silent=True)
92	    name = data.get('name') if data else None
93	    if not name or not isinstance(name, str) or not name.strip():
94	        return jsonify({"status": "error", "message": "Tag name is required and must not be empty"}), 400
95	    name = name.strip()
96	
97	    duplicate = Tag.query.filter(Tag.name == name, Tag.id != id).first()
98	    if duplicate:
99	        return jsonify({"status": "error", "message": "Tag name already exists"}), 409
100	
101	    tag.name = name
102	    db.session.commit()
103	
104	    return jsonify({"status": "ok", "data": tag_to_dict(tag)}), 200
105	
106	
107	@tag_bp.route('/tags/<int:id>', methods=['DELETE'])
108	def delete_tag(id):
109	    """Delete a tag.
110	
111	    - 404 if tag with given id does not exist
112	    - 200 on success; cascade deletes article_tags associations automatically
113	    """
114	    tag = db.session.get(Tag, id)
115	    if not tag:
116	        return jsonify({"status": "error", "message": "Tag not found"}), 404
117	
118	    db.session.delete(tag)
119	    db.session.commit()
120	
121	    return jsonify({"status": "ok", "data": {"message": "Tag deleted"}}), 200
122

1	"""
2	T2 Blog — Article Routes
3	
4	Implement article CRUD and tag-binding routes.
5	Register as a Flask Blueprint named 'article_bp'.
6	
7	Requirements:
8	- GET /articles -> List all articles
9	  Optional query params: tag (filter by tag name), tag_id (filter by tag ID)
10	  Response: {"status": "ok", "data": [{"id": int, "title": str, "body": str}, ...]}
11	
12	- POST /articles -> Create article
13	  Request: {"title": str, "body": str}
14	  Response: {"status": "ok", "data": {"id": int, "title": str, "body": str}}
15	  Errors: 400 if title or body missing
16	
17	- GET /articles/<id> -> Get single article
18	  Response: {"status": "ok", "data": {"id": int, "title": str, "body": str}}
19	  Errors: 404 if not found
20	
21	- POST /articles/<id>/tags -> Bind tags to article
22	  Request: {"tag_ids": [int, ...]}
23	  Response: {"status": "ok", "data": {"message": "Tags bound"}}
24	  Errors: 404 if article not found, 400 if tag not found
25	
26	- GET /articles/<id>/tags -> Get article's tags
27	  Response: {"status": "ok", "data": [{"id": int, "name": str}, ...]}
28	  Errors: 404 if article not found
29	
30	- DELETE /articles/<id>/tags/<tag_id> -> Unbind tag from article
31	  Response: {"status": "ok", "data": {"message": "Tag unbound"}}
32	  Errors: 404 if article not found
33	
34	IMPORTANT: This module works with models.py (Article, Tag, article_tags) and
35	routes_tag.py. Make sure field names and response formats are consistent.
36	"""
37	
38	from flask import Blueprint, request, jsonify
39	
40	from app import db
41	from models import Article, Tag
42	
43	article_bp = Blueprint('article_bp', __name__)
44	
45	
46	def article_to_dict(article):
47	    """Serialize an Article object to a dictionary."""
48	    return {"id": article.id, "title": article.title, "body": article.body}
49	
50	
51	def tag_to_dict(tag):
52	    """Serialize a Tag object to a dictionary."""
53	    return {"id": tag.id, "name": tag.name}
54	
55	
56	# ============================================================
57	# POST /articles — 创建文章
58	# Design: 3.2 Section 1, FR-ART-01
59	# ============================================================
60	
61	@article_bp.route('/articles', methods=['POST'])
62	def create_article():
63	    """Create a new article.
64	
65	    Request body: {"title": "str", "body": "str"}
66	    - 400 if title or body is missing or empty/non-string
67	    - 201 on success
68	    """
69	    data = request.get_json(silent=True)
70	    if not data:
71	        return jsonify({"status": "error", "message": "Request body must be JSON"}), 400
72	
73	    title = data.get('title')
74	    body = data.get('body')
75	
76	    if not title or not isinstance(title, str) or not title.strip():
77	        return jsonify({"status": "error", "message": "title is required"}), 400
78	    if not body or not isinstance(body, str) or not body.strip():
79	        return jsonify({"status": "error", "message": "body is required"}), 400
80	
81	    article = Article(title=title.strip(), body=body.strip())
82	    db.session.add(article)
83	    db.session.commit()
84	
85	    return jsonify({"status": "ok", "data": article_to_dict(article)}), 201
86	
87	
88	# ============================================================
89	# GET /articles — 列出所有文章（支持标签筛选）
90	# Design: 3.2 Section 2, FR-ART-02
91	# ============================================================
92	
93	@article_bp.route('/articles', methods=['GET'])
94	def list_articles():
95	    """List all articles, optionally filtered by tag.
96	
97	    Query params:
98	    - tag_id: filter by tag ID (takes priority)
99	    - tag: filter by tag name (fallback if tag_id not provided)
100	    - No params: return all articles
101	    """
102	    tag_id = request.args.get('tag_id')
103	    tag_name = request.args.get('tag')
104	
105	    if tag_id:
106	        try:
107	            tag_id_int = int(tag_id)
108	        except (ValueError, TypeError):
109	            return jsonify({"status": "ok", "data": []}), 200
110	        tag = db.session.get(Tag, tag_id_int)
111	        articles = tag.articles.all() if tag else []
112	    elif tag_name:
113	        tag = Tag.query.filter_by(name=tag_name).first()
114	        articles = tag.articles.all() if tag else []
115	    else:
116	        articles = Article.query.all()
117	
118	    return jsonify({"status": "ok", "data": [article_to_dict(a) for a in articles]}), 200
119	
120	
121	# ============================================================
122	# GET /articles/<id> — 获取单篇文章
123	# Design: 3.2 Section 3, FR-ART-03
124	# ============================================================
125	
126	@article_bp.route('/articles/<int:id>', methods=['GET'])
127	def get_article(id):
128	    """Get a single article by ID.
129	
130	    - 404 if article not found
131	    - 200 on success
132	    """
133	    article = db.session.get(Article, id)
134	    if not article:
135	        return jsonify({"status": "error", "message": "Article not found"}), 404
136	
137	    return jsonify({"status": "ok", "data": article_to_dict(article)}), 200
138	
139	
140	# ============================================================
141	# POST /articles/<id>/tags — 为文章绑定标签
142	# Design: 3.2 Section 4, FR-ART-04
143	# ============================================================
144	
145	@article_bp.route('/articles/<int:id>/tags', methods=['POST'])
146	def bind_tags(id):
147	    """Bind tags to an article.
148	
149	    Request body: {"tag_ids": [int, ...]}
150	    - 404 if article not found
151	    - 400 if any tag_id in tag_ids does not exist
152	    - 200 on success (idempotent: already-bound tags are silently skipped)
153	    """
154	    article = db.session.get(Article, id)
155	    if not article:
156	        return jsonify({"status": "error", "message": "Article not found"}), 404
157	
158	    data = request.get_json(silent=True)
159	    if not data:
160	        return jsonify({"status": "error", "message": "Request body must be JSON"}), 400
161	
162	    tag_ids = data.get('tag_ids', [])
163	    if not isinstance(tag_ids, list):
164	        return jsonify({"status": "error", "message": "tag_ids must be a list"}), 400
165	
166	    tags = []
167	    for tid in tag_ids:
168	        tag = db.session.get(Tag, tid)
169	        if not tag:
170	            return jsonify({"status": "error", "message": f"Tag {tid} not found"}), 400
171	        if tag not in article.tags:  # idempotent: skip already-bound tags
172	            tags.append(tag)
173	
174	    if tags:
175	        article.tags.extend(tags)
176	        db.session.commit()
177	
178	    return jsonify({"status": "ok", "data": {"message": "Tags bound"}}), 200
179	
180	
181	# ============================================================
182	# GET /articles/<id>/tags — 获取文章的所有标签
183	# Design: 3.2 Section 5, FR-ART-05
184	# ============================================================
185	
186	@article_bp.route('/articles/<int:id>/tags', methods=['GET'])
187	def get_article_tags(id):
188	    """Get all tags bound to an article.
189	
190	    - 404 if article not found
191	    - 200 on success (returns list of tags, possibly empty)
192	    """
193	    article = db.session.get(Article, id)
194	    if not article:
195	        return jsonify({"status": "error", "message": "Article not found"}), 404
196	
197	    return jsonify({"status": "ok", "data": [tag_to_dict(t) for t in article.tags]}), 200
198	
199	
200	# ============================================================
201	# DELETE /articles/<id>/tags/<tag_id> — 解除关联
202	# Design: 3.2 Section 6, FR-ART-06
203	# ============================================================
204	
205	@article_bp.route('/articles/<int:id>/tags/<int:tag_id>', methods=['DELETE'])
206	def unbind_tag(id, tag_id):
207	    """Unbind a tag from an article.
208	
209	    - 404 if article not found
210	    - 200 on success even if the tag was not bound to the article
211	    """
212	    article = db.session.get(Article, id)
213	    if not article:
214	        return jsonify({"status": "error", "message": "Article not found"}), 404
215	
216	    tag = db.session.get(Tag, tag_id)
217	    if tag and tag in article.tags:
218	        article.tags.remove(tag)
219	        db.session.commit()
220	
221	    return jsonify({"status": "ok", "data": {"message": "Tag unbound"}}), 200
222

1	"""
2	T2 Blog — Data Models
3	
4	Define SQLAlchemy models here.
5	Requirements:
6	- Article: id, title (non-empty string), body (text)
7	- Tag: id, name (unique, non-null)
8	- article_tags: many-to-many association table
9	"""
10	
11	from flask_sqlalchemy import SQLAlchemy
12	import sys
13	import os
14	sys.path.insert(0, os.path.dirname(__file__))
15	
16	from app import db
17	
18	# Many-to-many association table
19	article_tags = db.Table('article_tags',
20	    db.Column('article_id', db.Integer, db.ForeignKey('article.id'), primary_key=True),
21	    db.Column('tag_id', db.Integer, db.ForeignKey('tag.id'), primary_key=True)
22	)
23	
24	
25	class Article(db.Model):
26	    id = db.Column(db.Integer, primary_key=True)
27	    title = db.Column(db.String(200), nullable=False)
28	    body = db.Column(db.Text, nullable=False)
29	    tags = db.relationship('Tag', secondary=article_tags,
30	                           backref=db.backref('articles', lazy='dynamic'))
31	
32	
33	class Tag(db.Model):
34	    id = db.Column(db.Integer, primary_key=True)
35	    name = db.Column(db.String(80), unique=True, nullable=False)
36

1	"""
2	T2 Blog — Flask App Factory & DB Initialization
3	
4	This file sets up the Flask app and database. DO NOT MODIFY this file.
5	All business logic goes in the other modules.
6	"""
7	
8	from flask import Flask
9	from flask_sqlalchemy import SQLAlchemy
10	import os
11	
12	db = SQLAlchemy()
13	
14	
15	def create_app():
16	    app = Flask(__name__)
17	    app.config['SQLALCHEMY_DATABASE_URI'] = 'sqlite:///blog.db'
18	    app.config['SQLALCHEMY_TRACK_MODIFICATIONS'] = False
19	
20	    db.init_app(app)
21	
22	    # Import and register models
23	    from models import Article, Tag
24	
25	    # Import and register route blueprints
26	    from routes_article import article_bp
